content.content:
1	# OKKI 客户分类规则（v2 · 双轴模型）
2	
3	> 生成日期：2026-05-11 | 状态：已确认，每次分析必须遵守
4	> 替代旧 P0-P4 单轴模型。旧模型仅按紧急度分类，忽略客户价值维度。
5	
6	---
7	
8	## 一、总则
9	
10	每个客户用两个独立维度标记：**生命周期阶段**（决定做什么）+ **质量等级**（决定投入多少）。
11	
12	两轴独立。一个"初询阶段的 S 级客户"和一个"PI 已发的 C 级客户"策略完全不同。
13	
14	分级信息不足时 → 默认降一级 → 标注【需你决策】。禁止因"可能是大客户"拔高。
15	
16	---
17	
18	## 二、生命周期（8 阶段 + 沉默副状态）
19	
20	### 活跃阶段
21	
22	| # | 阶段 | 判定条件 | 下一步 |
23	|---|------|---------|--------|
24	| 1 | **待回复** | 客户发来消息，我方未回复 | 24h 内回复 |
25	| 2 | **初询沟通** | 互相了解需求/要目录/问MOQ | 24h 内有效推进 |
26	| 3 | **报价已发** | 价格/产品已发，等客户反应 | 第3天首次跟进，之后每2-3天 |
27	| 4 | **谈判/样品** | 讨论价格/规格/运费/样品 | 48h 跟进 |
28	| 5 | **PI已发** | PI 发出，等付款 | 48h 确认收到，7天催款 |
29	| 6 | **订单执行中** | 已付款→生产→发货 | 每周同步一次，关键节点主动通知 |
30	| 7 | **已签收** | 货到，等反馈/复购 | 签收后 **7 天**回访 |
31	| 8 | **售后** | 质量问题/投诉/退换 | 投诉类 ≤1h，常规 24h |
32	
33	### 沉默副状态（可挂载到任何活跃阶段）
34	
35	**核心原则：不放弃任何一个客户。** 客户没拉黑我就继续发，让他记住"这个供应商就是做这个的"，下次有需求第一个想到我。
36	
37	| 沉默时长 | 标签 | 策略 |
38	|---------|------|------|
39	| 3-7 天 | 短期沉默 | 温和提醒，给新信息 |
40	| 7-14 天 | 中期沉默 | 换策略重联，分析沉默根因 |
41	| 14-30 天 | 长期沉默 | 价值型内容触达（行业信息/同行案例/工厂动态） |
42	| 30-90 天 | 深度沉默 | 降低频率，新品/节日/工厂新闻维系存在感 |
43	| 90天+ | 沉淀 | 仅 S/A 保持最低频率触达（1-2月/次）；B/C 暂停等新产品/新认证再激活 |
44	
45	**降频触发**（默认频率 15 天/次）：
46	- 连续 3 次未读 → 降至 30 天/次
47	- 连降 3 次 30 天仍不读 → 降至 60 天/次
48	- 已读未回 → 不降频（他在看，说明起作用了）
49	
50	**停止条件**：
51	- 客户明确说 stop / 拉黑 / 消息发不出去 → 停止
52	- 连续 6 次未读（约 3 个月）→ 暂停常规触达，等有新产品/新认证/大单案例再激活
53	
54	**沉默窗口不能独立存在**，必须标明"在哪个阶段沉默了"。
55	例："报价已发 → 沉默14天" vs "谈判中 → 沉默14天" → 完全不同的处理。
56	
57	已成交客户（阶段6/7）沉默容忍度更高。签收后 90 天进入深度沉默，180 天才进入沉淀。
58	
59	---
60	
61	## 三、质量等级（5 级 S/A/B/C/D）
62	
63	### 硬判定标准 — 满足任意一条即可定级
64	
65	**S 级 — 战略客户**
66	
67	- 品牌商/ODM + 首单 ≥ 500 件 + 定制包装/吊牌/条形码
68	- 有明确分销渠道 — Amazon、连锁零售、区域代理网络
69	- 复购客户，累计 ≥ 1000 件 或 金额 ≥ $3000（以 OKKI 订单数据为准，无数据则看对话确认）
70	- 公司规模大 — 客户自述或背调确认（加分项，不是硬线）
71	- 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接/公司资料
72	
73	**A 级 — 优质客户**
74	
75	- 批发商/零售商 + 明确批量 ≥ 200 件 + 沟通专业
76	- 现货大单 — 批发商身份 + 200-500 件以上
77	- 定制/OEM 需求 + 态度认真，反复沟通细节
78	- 已成交客户，首单 200-500 件
79	- 样品已寄出、在等反馈
80	- 已确认接受 MOQ 500、在谈价格
81	
82	**B 级 — 普通客户**
83	
84	- 小零售商 + 需求模糊 + 量未定
85	- 有真实需求但量暂未确认的批发商
86	- 需求明确但量小 — 50-200 件非定制
87	- 信息不足但对话活跃 — 暂无法判断规模
88	
89	**C 级 — 低价值客户**
90	
91	- 个人买家/自用/送礼 + ≤ 30 件
92	- 一次性采购，无复购可能
93	- 行为散漫 — 问完消失、无决策权
94	
95	**D 级 — 无关/废弃**
96	
97	- 品类完全不匹配（成人服装等）
98	- 仅系统消息，无任何真实客户对话
99	- 非采购意图（问转让/加盟/找工作）
100	- 误入/垃圾询盘
101	
102	### 质量等级约束规则
103	
104	- **不存在"核心市场加分"** — 客户在哪里跟质量无关。火星来的优质客户照样是优质。
105	- **公司规模是加分项，不是硬线** — 只有客户自述或背调确认才算数
106	- **信息不足默认降一级** — 看不出规模的先放 B
107	- **信号触发可升级** — B 级展现品牌/渠道/批量信号后 → 升 A 或 S
108	
109	---
110	
111	## 四、14 条边缘情况
112	
113	以下场景标准判定会失效。遇到时标注"边缘情况 #N"，附带建议但不强制定级，等你确认。
114	
115	| # | 类型 | 信号 | 处理 |
116	|---|------|------|------|
117	| 1 | 大客户试水 | 品牌/连锁身份 + 首单很小 | 按身份定级，不按当前订单量。标"试水型" |
118	| 2 | 季节性大客户 | 历史有大单 + 每年固定时间联系 | 标"季节性"，不按常规沉默规则 |
119	| 3 | 中间人/采购代理 | "for client"/要第三方验货/只关心物流不关心价格 | 主动问"给客户还是给自己采购"确认身份 |
120	| 4 | 新兴市场大客户 | 来自核心市场 + 量大 + 网上查不到 | 不因"查不到"降级。以对话和订单量判 |
121	| 5 | 关系型慢转化 | 消息量巨大 + 信任度高 + 转化时间长 | 不逼单不降级。聊天维护+新品同步 |
122	| 6 | 语言障碍假象 | 语法差但需求量明确 + 法语/阿语区 | 用客户母语问关键信息。不因语言降级 |
123	| 7 | 被供应商坑过 | 反复确认认证/质量 + 警惕但需求量不小 | 主动发认证+工厂实拍。耐心回应 |
124	| 8 | 离岸注册 | 注册国是避税地但收货地址暴露真实市场 | 以收货地址/对话判真实市场 |
125	| 9 | 拼单采购 | "my friends also want"/多次选款量小/问混款折扣 | 主动问是否分开发来判断总需求 |
126	| 10 | 传统老派商人 | 提到仓库/店铺/分销 + 订货量高 + 网上查不到 | 以订单量和对话内容为准 |
127	| 11 | 假大客户 | 嘴上说1000件但三月不下单 | 持续性验证。不因"说了大单"就给S |
128	| 12 | 质量有时效 | 半年前A级 + 半年无互动 | 沉默超阈值自动触发重新评估 |
129	| 13 | 样品专业户 | 反复要样品从不订货 | 即使"样品寄出"也需看历史是否多次索样 |
130	| 14 | 品类周期间歇 | 圣诞款买完自然消失半年 | 了解客户采购品类周期，不误判流失 |
131	
132	---
133	
134	## 五、时间触发提醒（输出要求）
135	
136	**每次数据同步后必须输出此模块。**
137	
138	### 单客户提醒格式
139	
140	```
141	**客户名** | 国家 | 质量等级 | 生命周期阶段
142	上次我方发送：X天前 | 上次客户回复：X天前
143	⚠️ 提醒：[沉默天数/节点到期/关键窗口]
144	下一步：[具体动作]
145	```
146	
147	### 分类汇总格式
148	
149	```
150	## 🚨 今天必须行动
151	| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
152	|------|:---:|------|---------|
153	
154	## ⏳ 48h 内
155	| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
156	|------|:---:|------|---------|
157	
158	## 📅 本周关注
159	| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
160	|------|:---:|------|---------|
161	```
162	
163	---
164	
165	## 六、双轴交叉策略
166	
167	> 生命周期决定"做什么"，质量等级决定"投入多少"。本章定义关键交叉点的差异化做法。
168	> 新增于 2026-05-11 方案讨论。
169	
170	### 通用原则（所有等级适用，不区分）
171	
172	以下对所有客户一视同仁：
173	- **Pampers/Disney 实锤** — 所有客户首次沟通都应亮出，这是工厂最硬的信任锚点
174	- **工厂视频、认证、大牌合作证据** — 标配材料，所有客户都会收到
175	- **样品一律收费** — 大货订单可抵扣样品费
176	
177	### 4 组差异化交叉点
178	
179	**S/A × 初询 vs B/C × 初询**
180	
181	| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
182	|------|-----|-----|
183	| 回复前研究 | 搜品牌/店铺/渠道，话术定制 | 标准模板，对方表达需求后再深挖 |
184	| 首次回复目标 | 建立"同级别工厂伙伴"认知 | 确认需求+推进到下一步 |
185	
186	**S/A × 报价已发 vs B/C × 报价已发**
187	
188	| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
189	|------|-----|-----|
190	| 跟进节奏 | 48h，每次带新信息/价值 | 3-5 天，温和提醒 |
191	| 无回应 | 持续跟，不减轮次 | 3 轮后转入沉默副状态，按降频规则继续触达 |
192	
193	**S/A × 沉默 vs B × 沉默 vs C × 沉默**
194	
195	> 都不放弃，但激活内容的投入度不同。
196	
197	| 维度 | S/A | B | C |
198	|------|-----|---|---|
199	| 激活方式 | 定制 — 复盘原始卡点，针对性破局 | 半定制 — 好模板 + 1-2个个性化细节 | 价值模板 — 行业信息/同行案例/工厂动态 |
200	| 每次耗时 | 10-15 分钟 | 2-3 分钟 | 30 秒 |
201	| 默认频率 | 15 天/次 | 15 天/次 | 15 天/次 |
202	| 降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 |
203	| 沉淀后 | 保持 1-2 月/次最低触达 | 暂停，等新产品/新认证激活 | 暂停，等新产品/新认证激活 |
204	
205	**S/A × 定制投入 vs B/C × 定制投入**
206	
207	| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
208	|------|-----|-----|
209	| Mockup/方案 | 主动做，不等客户开口 | 对方确认意向后才做 |
210	| 判断依据 | 品牌身份/渠道信号明确 + 首单可覆盖 MOQ | 需求模糊或量未确认 |
211	
212	### 演化规则
213	
214	- 灰色地带案例 → 标注"边缘情况"，用户确认后追加判例
215	- 实际执行中认为某个交叉点策略需要调整 → 立即更新本章
216	
217	---
218	## 七、规则进化机制
219	
220	1. 每次你说"这个分错了" → 立刻更新本文件对应规则
221	2. 新增判例 → 追加到边缘情况列表
222	3. 每次更新本文件后 → 同步更新 STATE.md 的版本记录
223	
224	---
225	
226	## 八、线下聊天同步
227	
228	WhatsApp/微信上的客户进展，维护到 `08_客户跟进/Okki/data/offline_chat_log.md`。
229	
230	格式：
231	```
232	## [客户名] ([国家]) — [平台]
233	- YYYY-MM-DD：[进展内容]
234	```
235	
236	每次分析时，先读此文件，把线下进度与 OKKI 数据合并后再分类。
237

# OKKI 客户分类规则（v2 · 双轴模型）

> 生成日期：2026-05-11 | 状态：已确认，每次分析必须遵守
> 替代旧 P0-P4 单轴模型。旧模型仅按紧急度分类，忽略客户价值维度。

---

## 一、总则

每个客户用两个独立维度标记：**生命周期阶段**（决定做什么）+ **质量等级**（决定投入多少）。

两轴独立。一个"初询阶段的 S 级客户"和一个"PI 已发的 C 级客户"策略完全不同。

分级信息不足时 → 默认降一级 → 标注【需你决策】。禁止因"可能是大客户"拔高。

---

## 二、生命周期（8 阶段 + 沉默副状态）

### 活跃阶段

| # | 阶段 | 判定条件 | 下一步 |
|---|------|---------|--------|
| 1 | **待回复** | 客户发来消息，我方未回复 | 24h 内回复 |
| 2 | **初询沟通** | 互相了解需求/要目录/问MOQ | 24h 内有效推进 |
| 3 | **报价已发** | 价格/产品已发，等客户反应 | 第3天首次跟进，之后每2-3天 |
| 4 | **谈判/样品** | 讨论价格/规格/运费/样品 | 48h 跟进 |
| 5 | **PI已发** | PI 发出，等付款 | 48h 确认收到，7天催款 |
| 6 | **订单执行中** | 已付款→生产→发货 | 每周同步一次，关键节点主动通知 |
| 7 | **已签收** | 货到，等反馈/复购 | 签收后 **7 天**回访 |
| 8 | **售后** | 质量问题/投诉/退换 | 投诉类 ≤1h，常规 24h |

### 沉默副状态（可挂载到任何活跃阶段）

**核心原则：不放弃任何一个客户。** 客户没拉黑我就继续发，让他记住"这个供应商就是做这个的"，下次有需求第一个想到我。

| 沉默时长 | 标签 | 策略 |
|---------|------|------|
| 3-7 天 | 短期沉默 | 温和提醒，给新信息 |
| 7-14 天 | 中期沉默 | 换策略重联，分析沉默根因 |
| 14-30 天 | 长期沉默 | 价值型内容触达（行业信息/同行案例/工厂动态） |
| 30-90 天 | 深度沉默 | 降低频率，新品/节日/工厂新闻维系存在感 |
| 90天+ | 沉淀 | 仅 S/A 保持最低频率触达（1-2月/次）；B/C 暂停等新产品/新认证再激活 |

**降频触发**（默认频率 15 天/次）：
- 连续 3 次未读 → 降至 30 天/次
- 连降 3 次 30 天仍不读 → 降至 60 天/次
- 已读未回 → 不降频（他在看，说明起作用了）

**停止条件**：
- 客户明确说 stop / 拉黑 / 消息发不出去 → 停止
- 连续 6 次未读（约 3 个月）→ 暂停常规触达，等有新产品/新认证/大单案例再激活

**沉默窗口不能独立存在**，必须标明"在哪个阶段沉默了"。
例："报价已发 → 沉默14天" vs "谈判中 → 沉默14天" → 完全不同的处理。

已成交客户（阶段6/7）沉默容忍度更高。签收后 90 天进入深度沉默，180 天才进入沉淀。

---

## 三、质量等级（5 级 S/A/B/C/D）

### 硬判定标准 — 满足任意一条即可定级

**S 级 — 战略客户**

- 品牌商/ODM + 首单 ≥ 500 件 + 定制包装/吊牌/条形码
- 有明确分销渠道 — Amazon、连锁零售、区域代理网络
- 复购客户，累计 ≥ 1000 件 或 金额 ≥ $3000（以 OKKI 订单数据为准，无数据则看对话确认）
- 公司规模大 — 客户自述或背调确认（加分项，不是硬线）
- 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接/公司资料

**A 级 — 优质客户**

- 批发商/零售商 + 明确批量 ≥ 200 件 + 沟通专业
- 现货大单 — 批发商身份 + 200-500 件以上
- 定制/OEM 需求 + 态度认真，反复沟通细节
- 已成交客户，首单 200-500 件
- 样品已寄出、在等反馈
- 已确认接受 MOQ 500、在谈价格

**B 级 — 普通客户**

- 小零售商 + 需求模糊 + 量未定
- 有真实需求但量暂未确认的批发商
- 需求明确但量小 — 50-200 件非定制
- 信息不足但对话活跃 — 暂无法判断规模

**C 级 — 低价值客户**

- 个人买家/自用/送礼 + ≤ 30 件
- 一次性采购，无复购可能
- 行为散漫 — 问完消失、无决策权

**D 级 — 无关/废弃**

- 品类完全不匹配（成人服装等）
- 仅系统消息，无任何真实客户对话
- 非采购意图（问转让/加盟/找工作）
- 误入/垃圾询盘

### 质量等级约束规则

- **不存在"核心市场加分"** — 客户在哪里跟质量无关。火星来的优质客户照样是优质。
- **公司规模是加分项，不是硬线** — 只有客户自述或背调确认才算数
- **信息不足默认降一级** — 看不出规模的先放 B
- **信号触发可升级** — B 级展现品牌/渠道/批量信号后 → 升 A 或 S

---

## 四、14 条边缘情况

以下场景标准判定会失效。遇到时标注"边缘情况 #N"，附带建议但不强制定级，等你确认。

| # | 类型 | 信号 | 处理 |
|---|------|------|------|
| 1 | 大客户试水 | 品牌/连锁身份 + 首单很小 | 按身份定级，不按当前订单量。标"试水型" |
| 2 | 季节性大客户 | 历史有大单 + 每年固定时间联系 | 标"季节性"，不按常规沉默规则 |
| 3 | 中间人/采购代理 | "for client"/要第三方验货/只关心物流不关心价格 | 主动问"给客户还是给自己采购"确认身份 |
| 4 | 新兴市场大客户 | 来自核心市场 + 量大 + 网上查不到 | 不因"查不到"降级。以对话和订单量判 |
| 5 | 关系型慢转化 | 消息量巨大 + 信任度高 + 转化时间长 | 不逼单不降级。聊天维护+新品同步 |
| 6 | 语言障碍假象 | 语法差但需求量明确 + 法语/阿语区 | 用客户母语问关键信息。不因语言降级 |
| 7 | 被供应商坑过 | 反复确认认证/质量 + 警惕但需求量不小 | 主动发认证+工厂实拍。耐心回应 |
| 8 | 离岸注册 | 注册国是避税地但收货地址暴露真实市场 | 以收货地址/对话判真实市场 |
| 9 | 拼单采购 | "my friends also want"/多次选款量小/问混款折扣 | 主动问是否分开发来判断总需求 |
| 10 | 传统老派商人 | 提到仓库/店铺/分销 + 订货量高 + 网上查不到 | 以订单量和对话内容为准 |
| 11 | 假大客户 | 嘴上说1000件但三月不下单 | 持续性验证。不因"说了大单"就给S |
| 12 | 质量有时效 | 半年前A级 + 半年无互动 | 沉默超阈值自动触发重新评估 |
| 13 | 样品专业户 | 反复要样品从不订货 | 即使"样品寄出"也需看历史是否多次索样 |
| 14 | 品类周期间歇 | 圣诞款买完自然消失半年 | 了解客户采购品类周期，不误判流失 |

---

## 五、时间触发提醒（输出要求）

**每次数据同步后必须输出此模块。**

### 单客户提醒格式

```
**客户名** | 国家 | 质量等级 | 生命周期阶段
上次我方发送：X天前 | 上次客户回复：X天前
⚠️ 提醒：[沉默天数/节点到期/关键窗口]
下一步：[具体动作]
```

### 分类汇总格式

```
## 🚨 今天必须行动
| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
|------|:---:|------|---------|

## ⏳ 48h 内
| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
|------|:---:|------|---------|

## 📅 本周关注
| 客户 | 质量 | 阶段 | 提醒原因 |
|------|:---:|------|---------|
```

---

## 六、双轴交叉策略

> 生命周期决定"做什么"，质量等级决定"投入多少"。本章定义关键交叉点的差异化做法。
> 新增于 2026-05-11 方案讨论。

### 通用原则（所有等级适用，不区分）

以下对所有客户一视同仁：
- **Pampers/Disney 实锤** — 所有客户首次沟通都应亮出，这是工厂最硬的信任锚点
- **工厂视频、认证、大牌合作证据** — 标配材料，所有客户都会收到
- **样品一律收费** — 大货订单可抵扣样品费

### 4 组差异化交叉点

**S/A × 初询 vs B/C × 初询**

| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
|------|-----|-----|
| 回复前研究 | 搜品牌/店铺/渠道，话术定制 | 标准模板，对方表达需求后再深挖 |
| 首次回复目标 | 建立"同级别工厂伙伴"认知 | 确认需求+推进到下一步 |

**S/A × 报价已发 vs B/C × 报价已发**

| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
|------|-----|-----|
| 跟进节奏 | 48h，每次带新信息/价值 | 3-5 天，温和提醒 |
| 无回应 | 持续跟，不减轮次 | 3 轮后转入沉默副状态，按降频规则继续触达 |

**S/A × 沉默 vs B × 沉默 vs C × 沉默**

> 都不放弃，但激活内容的投入度不同。

| 维度 | S/A | B | C |
|------|-----|---|---|
| 激活方式 | 定制 — 复盘原始卡点，针对性破局 | 半定制 — 好模板 + 1-2个个性化细节 | 价值模板 — 行业信息/同行案例/工厂动态 |
| 每次耗时 | 10-15 分钟 | 2-3 分钟 | 30 秒 |
| 默认频率 | 15 天/次 | 15 天/次 | 15 天/次 |
| 降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 | 同通用降频规则 |
| 沉淀后 | 保持 1-2 月/次最低触达 | 暂停，等新产品/新认证激活 | 暂停，等新产品/新认证激活 |

**S/A × 定制投入 vs B/C × 定制投入**

| 维度 | S/A | B/C |
|------|-----|-----|
| Mockup/方案 | 主动做，不等客户开口 | 对方确认意向后才做 |
| 判断依据 | 品牌身份/渠道信号明确 + 首单可覆盖 MOQ | 需求模糊或量未确认 |

### 演化规则

- 灰色地带案例 → 标注"边缘情况"，用户确认后追加判例
- 实际执行中认为某个交叉点策略需要调整 → 立即更新本章

---
## 七、规则进化机制

1. 每次你说"这个分错了" → 立刻更新本文件对应规则
2. 新增判例 → 追加到边缘情况列表
3. 每次更新本文件后 → 同步更新 STATE.md 的版本记录

---

## 八、线下聊天同步

WhatsApp/微信上的客户进展，维护到 `08_客户跟进/Okki/data/offline_chat_log.md`。

格式：
```
## [客户名] ([国家]) — [平台]
- YYYY-MM-DD：[进展内容]
```

每次分析时，先读此文件，把线下进度与 OKKI 数据合并后再分类。

content.content:
# OKKI CRM 客户分析项目

小星星服饰工厂（母婴纺织品 B2B OEM/ODM）的 OKKI CRM 客户分析。
用户是 OKKI **子账号**，同事是阿里国际站**主账号**。

## 启动必读（按需加载）

0. 先读 `STATE.md` 了解当前状态
1. **分类阶段**：读 `knowledge/classification-rules.md`（双轴分类体系）
2. **深度分析客户**：读 `knowledge/system-prompt.md`（五步分析框架）+ `knowledge/factory.md`（工厂信息速查）
3. **安全/抓取问题**：读 `knowledge/security.md`
4. **业务判断辅助**：读 `knowledge/business-rules.md`（消息过滤/报价/催款/国家节奏/升降级触发器）
5. 如果 `data/` 无今天数据 → 提示用户运行 `node scripts/sync_okki.js`

> 原则：按分析阶段按需加载，不全量读 knowledge/。分类阶段只需 STATE.md + classification-rules.md。

## 思考伙伴模式（核心行为准则）

你不是执行工具，是用户的思考伙伴。

**工具模式**：用户给指令 → 执行 → 输出结果 → 结束
**思考伙伴模式**：用户描述情况 → 分析 → 追问 → 挑战用户假设 → 一起得出结论

### 每条分析必须做到

1. 每条判断附带证据（从对话里哪句话得出）
2. 主动发现用户没问的模式、矛盾、异常信号
3. 如果用户的判断和对话证据不符，直接说"等一下，数据显示不是这样"
4. 穷举可能性（沉默不只一个原因，列出所有根因、概率、排除方法）
5. 追问式推进，推动下一步决策

### 每次输出后附上

> **我还注意到了（你没问但可能有价值的）：** ...
> **需要你确认的：** ...

（示例：客户说"I need to discuss with my brother"→不是决策者，"any updates?"无效，应问"How was the discussion with your brother?"帮夫妻店客户推进。原则：读对话原文 → 识别隐藏信号 → 针对性破局，不发模板话术。）

## 执行硬约束

- **禁止写脚本截取对话**：深度分析必须用 Read 工具直接读 chat_history 原文
- **任务路由**：轻量（批量分类/统计/筛选/"该跟进谁"）→ 当前对话直出。深度（单人分析+话术/沉默诊断/报价核验）→ 独立新对话执行
- **结论锚点**：每个"阶段/卡点"判断必须引用对话原文具体句子
- 分析完成后更新 `STATE.md`

## 数据结论自检规则

**任何基于数据的定量结论，必须先验证再输出。** 以下情况必须复查源数据：

1. **统计结果与直觉矛盾时** — 先质疑自己的统计逻辑，不是先上报
2. **声称数据"不可读/编码"前** — 必须先打印完整 JSON 结构，逐层找
3. **用了间接字段做判断时** — `latestMessage` 只代表最后一条，不能推断整体。判断"有没有"必须查原始消息列表
4. **输出统计数字前** — 至少手动抽查 3 个样本验证统计逻辑正确

**违反信号（出现任一即停止并复查）：**
- 统计结果=0，但数据量明显很大
- 用户说"不可能" → 用户对的概率远大于数据对的概率
- 用了 `latestMessage` / `lastMessage` 等"最后一条"字段推断整体情况

lastPrompt: 继续OKKI质量判定优化。方案A已确认：在enhanced_classify.js的消息循环中累加全量质量信号（品牌/渠道/批量/自用等），替代当前只扫最新3条消息的做法。完整S/A/B/C/D判定标准见classification-rules.md第61-107行。不确定项标注【需你决策】。需要把设计spec写出来并落地实现。

Let me analyze the current state:

## Current Problem in `enhanced_classify.js`

Looking at the `determineQuality()` function (lines 80-109), I can see the core issue:

**Current approach (只扫最新3条消息):**
- The function only examines `latestOurMsg`, `latestCustMsg`, and `lastCustQuestion` (the latest few messages/customer questions)
- It builds a `fullText` from just these latest messages
- All quality signals (S-level: brand/ODM/custom packaging, distribution channels, large quantity, company info; C-level: personal use, small quantity) are only detected from this `fullText` which is just the latest few messages
- This means if a customer mentioned "we're a brand distribute on Amazon" in message 5 of 50 total messages, but the latest 3 messages are just "thank you" / "ok", the system would miss the S-level signal and classify them as B

**What we need (方案A - 全量质量信号累加):**
- Scan ALL messages in the conversation, not just the latest ones
- Accumulate quality signals (brand/channel/bulk/personal use/etc.) across the entire message history
- This way, a one-time mention of being a brand or having Amazon channels would be captured

## What I need to do:

1. In the main loop (line 136-160), the script already iterates through ALL messages for `hasPI`, `hasAddress`, etc. boolean flags. 
2. But quality signals are NOT being accumulated here — they're only checked in `determineQuality()` which only looks at latest messages.
3. I need to add a new data structure to accumulate quality signals during the message loop, then pass those to the quality determination function.

Let me now plan the spec:

### Design Spec:

**Current**: `determineQuality()` takes `e` object, constructs `fullText` from just latest messages, runs regex on it.

**Target (方案A)**:
1. During the message loop (lines 136-160), accumulate quality signal flags alongside `hasPI`, `hasAddress`, etc.
2. New flags to track across ALL messages:
   - `brandOdmSignal` - 品牌/ODM/定制包装
   - `channelSignal` - 分销渠道 (Amazon/Walmart/Shopify/retail chain/distributor)
   - `bulkSignal` - 大批量 (numbers >= 500)
   - `companyInfoSignal` - 公司资料 (website/store/shop/company name)
   - `personalUseSignal` - 个人自用
   - `smallQtySignal` - 极小量 (1-30 pcs)
   - `irrelevantSignal` - 品类不匹配
   - `customOemSignal` - 定制/OEM需求 (for A-level)
   - `professionalSignal` - 沟通专业/态度认真 (for A-level)
   - `confirmedMoqSignal` - 已接受MOQ 500
   - `sampleSentSignal` - 样品已寄出
3. Pass these accumulated signals to `determineQuality()` instead of just latest text
4. The function uses the accumulated signals to determine grade

Let me read the full classification rules again to be precise about what signals map to what grades:

**S级:**
- 品牌商/ODM + 首单 >= 500件 + 定制包装/吊牌/条形码
- 有明确分销渠道 — Amazon、连锁零售、区域代理网络
- 复购客户，累计 >= 1000件 或 金额 >= $3000
- 公司规模大（加分项）
- 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接/公司资料

**A级:**
- 批发商/零售商 + 明确批量 >= 200件 + 沟通专业
- 现货大单 — 批发商身份 + 200-500件以上
- 定制/OEM需求 + 态度认真，反复沟通细节
- 已成交客户，首单200-500件
- 样品已寄出、在等反馈
- 已确认接受MOQ 500、在谈价格

**B级:**
- 小零售商 + 需求模糊 + 量未定
- 有真实需求但量暂未确认的批发商
- 需求明确但量小 — 50-200件非定制
- 信息不足但对话活跃 — 暂无法判断规模

**C级:**
- 个人买家/自用/送礼 + <=30件
- 一次性采购，无复购可能
- 行为散漫 — 问完消失、无决策权

**D级:**
- 品类完全不匹配
- 仅系统消息
- 非采购意图
- 误入/垃圾询盘

Now, the current `determineQuality` has a very simple signal detection. Let me think about what needs to change:

1. **Current signal detection** only scans `fullText` from latest messages
2. **New approach**: Accumulate all quality signals across ALL messages in the conversation

Let me think about the spec structure:

### Signals to accumulate (from all messages):

**S-level candidates:**
- `brandSignal` — "brand", "odm", "oem", "logo", "label", "custom packag", "hangtag", "barcode", "private label", "own design"
- `channelSignal` — "amazon", "walmart", "shopify", "retail chain", "distributor network", "wholesale channel"

**C-level candidates:**
- `personalUseSignal` — "for myself", "for my kid", "personal use", "自用", "gift"
- `smallQtySignal` — quantity <= 30

**D-level candidates:**

1	# 业务判断规则库
2	
3	> 用途：判断客户所处阶段、应采取的下一步行动、沉默风险阈值
4	> ⚠️ 客户分类体系已迁移到 `classification-rules.md`。本文件保留阶段速查和辅助规则。
5	
6	> 生命周期阶段、质量等级、沉默副状态、沉默阈值 → 以 `classification-rules.md` 为权威源。本文件仅保留业务判断辅助规则。
7	
8	## 不同国家客户沟通节奏
9	
10	- **中东（沙特/阿联酋/阿曼/伊拉克）**：周四-周五是周末，周日晚/周一早回复率高。阿拉伯语优先，尊重 Ramadan 和 Eid 节奏
11	- **非洲（苏丹/埃及/刚果/赞比亚/科特迪瓦）**：价格敏感，运费是核心障碍。多用法语或英语。耐心高但决策链长
12	- **美国**：快节奏，24h 内回复预期。专业度要求高，认证背书有效。L1+ 以小零售商为主
13	- **欧洲**：认证敏感，REACH/OEKO-TEX 是门槛。决策周期长，样品环节不可跳过
14	- **拉美**：西班牙语，时差大。价格敏感，海运为主要物流方式
15	
16	## 报价原则
17	
18	1. 永远不直接报具体价格（须老板审批）
19	2. 可给价格区间（如 $2.70-3.20/pc at 500 pcs）
20	3. 报价时同步标注有效期 3-7 天
21	4. 首次报价时同步发工厂/认证/产线图片背书
22	5. 报价后不主动降价——用"调整方案"代替"降价"
23	6. **绝不通过降低品质来降价**（降克重/换面料/减工艺均不可）。客户嫌贵时，用"增数量换单价"或"增值服务（免费印logo/定制标签）"来回应，品质标准不可妥协
24	
25	## 催款原则
26	
27	1. 先友好提醒 → 再制造紧迫感（旺季/涨价）→ 最后通牒
28	2. 催款话术 70% 价值 + 30% 催促
29	3. 不要在客户付款前开始生产（预付 40% 底线）
30	4. PI 发出后 48h 内跟进，超 7 天未付重新确认意向
31	
32	## 消息判断规则
33	
34	以下消息**不是**客户消息，必须过滤：
35	- "自动接待将不再触发"
36	- "Since you have read the conversation, the automatic reception will no longer intervene in this session."
37	- "Marco大模型翻译" / "阿里国际Marco大模型翻译"
38	- "买家有流失风险" / "Buyer has churn risk"
39	- "一旦离开平台发生纠纷或欺诈"
40	- "由于您介入该会话" / "Due to your intervention in this session"
41	- "反馈"
42	- "AI给您生成了一条回复建议"
43	- "You have a visitor. Follow up with them as soon as possible."
44	- "This buyer has been pre-screened and has a clear request. Please respond promptly to secure this opportunity."
45	- 其他系统自动发送的通知
46	
47	### latestMessageContent 提取规则
48	
49	提取 `latestMessageContent` 时，**跳过上述系统消息**，取最近一条真实对话消息（send 或 received）。如果整个对话只有系统消息，标注为 "(无真实对话)"。
50	
51	## 分类升级/降级触发器
52	
53	在 metadata 分类（unread/recent/time）完成后，用以下内容信号二次调整优先级：
54	
55	### 升级触发器（优先级+1或+2）
56	
57	| 信号 | 关键词/模式 | 调整 |
58	|------|------------|------|
59	| 客户说要下单 | "下单"/"place order"/"make order"/"сделаем заказ" | P1→P0 |
60	| 选款完成+地址已给 | 产品代码列表(如CO-XX)+地址信息 | P1→P0 |
61	| 数量已确认+地址已给 | 数量词+地址关键词 | P1→P0 |
62	| PI已发等付款 | PI关键词+等待状态 | 维持P0，标注"待付款" |
63	| 客户说"等合伙人/商量" | "partner"/"商量"/"определюсь с партнером" | P1→P0，标注"待决策" |
64	
65	### 降级触发器（优先级-1）
66	
67	| 信号 | 关键词/模式 | 调整 |
68	|------|------------|------|
69	| 仅系统消息+无实际对话 | latestMessage为系统消息+消息数≤3 | P0→P1 |
70	| 我方模板提问后客户不回复 | 模板问题(What is your/MOQ/how many)+客户沉默≥3天 | P0→P1 |
71	
72	### 最后一条消息权重
73	
74	- 表情(/handshake, 😂, 🤝)、单字(OK, yes, no) → 不是有效信号，往前看最近3条
75	- 系统消息 → 无效，往前看最近的真实消息
76	- 客户最近消息是**询盘卡片**且我方未回复 → 这是最高优先

# 业务判断规则库

> 用途：判断客户所处阶段、应采取的下一步行动、沉默风险阈值
> ⚠️ 客户分类体系已迁移到 `classification-rules.md`。本文件保留阶段速查和辅助规则。

> 生命周期阶段、质量等级、沉默副状态、沉默阈值 → 以 `classification-rules.md` 为权威源。本文件仅保留业务判断辅助规则。

## 不同国家客户沟通节奏

- **中东（沙特/阿联酋/阿曼/伊拉克）**：周四-周五是周末，周日晚/周一早回复率高。阿拉伯语优先，尊重 Ramadan 和 Eid 节奏
- **非洲（苏丹/埃及/刚果/赞比亚/科特迪瓦）**：价格敏感，运费是核心障碍。多用法语或英语。耐心高但决策链长
- **美国**：快节奏，24h 内回复预期。专业度要求高，认证背书有效。L1+ 以小零售商为主
- **欧洲**：认证敏感，REACH/OEKO-TEX 是门槛。决策周期长，样品环节不可跳过
- **拉美**：西班牙语，时差大。价格敏感，海运为主要物流方式

## 报价原则

1. 永远不直接报具体价格（须老板审批）
2. 可给价格区间（如 $2.70-3.20/pc at 500 pcs）
3. 报价时同步标注有效期 3-7 天
4. 首次报价时同步发工厂/认证/产线图片背书
5. 报价后不主动降价——用"调整方案"代替"降价"
6. **绝不通过降低品质来降价**（降克重/换面料/减工艺均不可）。客户嫌贵时，用"增数量换单价"或"增值服务（免费印logo/定制标签）"来回应，品质标准不可妥协

## 催款原则

1. 先友好提醒 → 再制造紧迫感（旺季/涨价）→ 最后通牒
2. 催款话术 70% 价值 + 30% 催促
3. 不要在客户付款前开始生产（预付 40% 底线）
4. PI 发出后 48h 内跟进，超 7 天未付重新确认意向

## 消息判断规则

以下消息**不是**客户消息，必须过滤：
- "自动接待将不再触发"
- "Since you have read the conversation, the automatic reception will no longer intervene in this session."
- "Marco大模型翻译" / "阿里国际Marco大模型翻译"
- "买家有流失风险" / "Buyer has churn risk"
- "一旦离开平台发生纠纷或欺诈"
- "由于您介入该会话" / "Due to your intervention in this session"
- "反馈"
- "AI给您生成了一条回复建议"
- "You have a visitor. Follow up with them as soon as possible."
- "This buyer has been pre-screened and has a clear request. Please respond promptly to secure this opportunity."
- 其他系统自动发送的通知

### latestMessageContent 提取规则

提取 `latestMessageContent` 时，**跳过上述系统消息**，取最近一条真实对话消息（send 或 received）。如果整个对话只有系统消息，标注为 "(无真实对话)"。

## 分类升级/降级触发器

在 metadata 分类（unread/recent/time）完成后，用以下内容信号二次调整优先级：

### 升级触发器（优先级+1或+2）

| 信号 | 关键词/模式 | 调整 |
|------|------------|------|
| 客户说要下单 | "下单"/"place order"/"make order"/"сделаем заказ" | P1→P0 |
| 选款完成+地址已给 | 产品代码列表(如CO-XX)+地址信息 | P1→P0 |
| 数量已确认+地址已给 | 数量词+地址关键词 | P1→P0 |
| PI已发等付款 | PI关键词+等待状态 | 维持P0，标注"待付款" |
| 客户说"等合伙人/商量" | "partner"/"商量"/"определюсь с партнером" | P1→P0，标注"待决策" |

### 降级触发器（优先级-1）

| 信号 | 关键词/模式 | 调整 |
|------|------------|------|
| 仅系统消息+无实际对话 | latestMessage为系统消息+消息数≤3 | P0→P1 |
| 我方模板提问后客户不回复 | 模板问题(What is your/MOQ/how many)+客户沉默≥3天 | P0→P1 |

### 最后一条消息权重

- 表情(/handshake, 😂, 🤝)、单字(OK, yes, no) → 不是有效信号，往前看最近3条
- 系统消息 → 无效，往前看最近的真实消息
- 客户最近消息是**询盘卡片**且我方未回复 → 这是最高优先

Now I have a full understanding of the codebase, the current problem, and the requirements. Let me now write the plan file. The design spec should be comprehensive.

Key findings:
1. Current `determineQuality()` only scans `fullText` built from latest messages (line 82)
2. The message loop (line 136-160) scans ALL messages but only for boolean flags (hasPI, hasAddress, etc.) — NOT for quality signals
3. Result: B级 = 81.1% (378/466) because quality signals are missed when they're in older messages
4. Known misclassifications: Keinjol Tata (品牌ODM+Amazon → should be S/A, but currently B), Ernestina (卡通睡衣=母婴正品 → shouldn't be D)

The fix (方案A): Accumulate quality signals across ALL messages in the message loop, then pass the accumulated signals to `determineQuality()`.

Let me write the plan now. I'll create a detailed design spec that covers:
1. New signal data structures
2. Signal detection patterns for each grade level
3. Grade determination logic with accumulated signals
4. Edge case handling
5. 【需你决策】marking
6. Output enhancements

content.text:
计划已写好，涵盖：信号累加数据结构、按等级分组的正则检测表、判定优先级、`【需你决策】` 标记规则、以及验证方式。

关键设计决策：
- **判定优先级**：D 先行排除 → S 硬标准 → A 硬标准 → 单信号预升级到 A → C 硬标准 → B 默认
- **单信号规则**：品牌/渠道/大批量任一出现 → 自动升到 A，但标注"待验证更多"
- **所有信号带消息位置**：每条信号记录 `msgIdx` + `snippet`，方便回查源消息

content.content: Launching skill: brainstorming

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: d:\ClaudeWorkspace\.claude\skills\brainstorming

# Brainstorming Ideas Into Designs

Help turn ideas into fully formed designs and specs through natural collaborative dialogue.

Start by understanding the current project context, then ask questions one at a time to refine the idea. Once you understand what you're building, present the design and get user approval.

<HARD-GATE>
Do NOT invoke any implementation skill, write any code, scaffold any project, or take any implementation action until you have presented a design and the user has approved it. This applies to EVERY project regardless of perceived simplicity.
</HARD-GATE>

## Anti-Pattern: "This Is Too Simple To Need A Design"

Every project goes through this process. A todo list, a single-function utility, a config change — all of them. "Simple" projects are where unexamined assumptions cause the most wasted work. The design can be short (a few sentences for truly simple projects), but you MUST present it and get approval.

## Checklist

You MUST create a task for each of these items and complete them in order:

1. **Explore project context** — check files, docs, recent commits
2. **Offer visual companion** (if topic will involve visual questions) — this is its own message, not combined with a clarifying question. See the Visual Companion section below.
3. **Ask clarifying questions** — one at a time, understand purpose/constraints/success criteria
4. **Propose 2-3 approaches** — with trade-offs and your recommendation
5. **Present design** — in sections scaled to their complexity, get user approval after each section
6. **Write design doc** — save to `docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md` and commit
7. **Spec self-review** — quick inline check for placeholders, contradictions, ambiguity, scope (see below)
8. **User reviews written spec** — ask user to review the spec file before proceeding
9. **Transition to implementation** — invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan

## Process Flow

```dot
digraph brainstorming {
    "Explore project context" [shape=box];
    "Visual questions ahead?" [shape=diamond];
    "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" [shape=box];
    "Ask clarifying questions" [shape=box];
    "Propose 2-3 approaches" [shape=box];
    "Present design sections" [shape=box];
    "User approves design?" [shape=diamond];
    "Write design doc" [shape=box];
    "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)" [shape=box];
    "User reviews spec?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke writing-plans skill" [shape=doublecircle];

    "Explore project context" -> "Visual questions ahead?";
    "Visual questions ahead?" -> "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" [label="yes"];
    "Visual questions ahead?" -> "Ask clarifying questions" [label="no"];
    "Offer Visual Companion\n(own message, no other content)" -> "Ask clarifying questions";
    "Ask clarifying questions" -> "Propose 2-3 approaches";
    "Propose 2-3 approaches" -> "Present design sections";
    "Present design sections" -> "User approves design?";
    "User approves design?" -> "Present design sections" [label="no, revise"];
    "User approves design?" -> "Write design doc" [label="yes"];
    "Write design doc" -> "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)";
    "Spec self-review\n(fix inline)" -> "User reviews spec?";
    "User reviews spec?" -> "Write design doc" [label="changes requested"];
    "User reviews spec?" -> "Invoke writing-plans skill" [label="approved"];
}
```

**The terminal state is invoking writing-plans.** Do NOT invoke frontend-design, mcp-builder, or any other implementation skill. The ONLY skill you invoke after brainstorming is writing-plans.

## The Process

**Understanding the idea:**

- Check out the current project state first (files, docs, recent commits)
- Before asking detailed questions, assess scope: if the request describes multiple independent subsystems (e.g., "build a platform with chat, file storage, billing, and analytics"), flag this immediately. Don't spend questions refining details of a project that needs to be decomposed first.
- If the project is too large for a single spec, help the user decompose into sub-projects: what are the independent pieces, how do they relate, what order should they be built? Then brainstorm the first sub-project through the normal design flow. Each sub-project gets its own spec → plan → implementation cycle.
- For appropriately-scoped projects, ask questions one at a time to refine the idea
- Prefer multiple choice questions when possible, but open-ended is fine too
- Only one question per message - if a topic needs more exploration, break it into multiple questions
- Focus on understanding: purpose, constraints, success criteria

**Exploring approaches:**

- Propose 2-3 different approaches with trade-offs
- Present options conversationally with your recommendation and reasoning
- Lead with your recommended option and explain why

**Presenting the design:**

- Once you believe you understand what you're building, present the design
- Scale each section to its complexity: a few sentences if straightforward, up to 200-300 words if nuanced
- Ask after each section whether it looks right so far
- Cover: architecture, components, data flow, error handling, testing
- Be ready to go back and clarify if something doesn't make sense

**Design for isolation and clarity:**

- Break the system into smaller units that each have one clear purpose, communicate through well-defined interfaces, and can be understood and tested independently
- For each unit, you should be able to answer: what does it do, how do you use it, and what does it depend on?
- Can someone understand what a unit does without reading its internals? Can you change the internals without breaking consumers? If not, the boundaries need work.
- Smaller, well-bounded units are also easier for you to work with - you reason better about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. When a file grows large, that's often a signal that it's doing too much.

**Working in existing codebases:**

- Explore the current structure before proposing changes. Follow existing patterns.
- Where existing code has problems that affect the work (e.g., a file that's grown too large, unclear boundaries, tangled responsibilities), include targeted improvements as part of the design - the way a good developer improves code they're working in.
- Don't propose unrelated refactoring. Stay focused on what serves the current goal.

## After the Design

**Documentation:**

- Write the validated design (spec) to `docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md`
  - (User preferences for spec location override this default)
- Use elements-of-style:writing-clearly-and-concisely skill if available
- Commit the design document to git

**Spec Self-Review:**
After writing the spec document, look at it with fresh eyes:

1. **Placeholder scan:** Any "TBD", "TODO", incomplete sections, or vague requirements? Fix them.
2. **Internal consistency:** Do any sections contradict each other? Does the architecture match the feature descriptions?
3. **Scope check:** Is this focused enough for a single implementation plan, or does it need decomposition?
4. **Ambiguity check:** Could any requirement be interpreted two different ways? If so, pick one and make it explicit.

Fix any issues inline. No need to re-review — just fix and move on.

**User Review Gate:**
After the spec review loop passes, ask the user to review the written spec before proceeding:

> "Spec written and committed to `<path>`. Please review it and let me know if you want to make any changes before we start writing out the implementation plan."

Wait for the user's response. If they request changes, make them and re-run the spec review loop. Only proceed once the user approves.

**Implementation:**

- Invoke the writing-plans skill to create a detailed implementation plan
- Do NOT invoke any other skill. writing-plans is the next step.

## Key Principles

- **One question at a time** - Don't overwhelm with multiple questions
- **Multiple choice preferred** - Easier to answer than open-ended when possible
- **YAGNI ruthlessly** - Remove unnecessary features from all designs
- **Explore alternatives** - Always propose 2-3 approaches before settling
- **Incremental validation** - Present design, get approval before moving on
- **Be flexible** - Go back and clarify when something doesn't make sense

## Visual Companion

A browser-based companion for showing mockups, diagrams, and visual options during brainstorming. Available as a tool — not a mode. Accepting the companion means it's available for questions that benefit from visual treatment; it does NOT mean every question goes through the browser.

**Offering the companion:** When you anticipate that upcoming questions will involve visual content (mockups, layouts, diagrams), offer it once for consent:
> "Some of what we're working on might be easier to explain if I can show it to you in a web browser. I can put together mockups, diagrams, comparisons, and other visuals as we go. This feature is still new and can be token-intensive. Want to try it? (Requires opening a local URL)"

**This offer MUST be its own message.** Do not combine it with clarifying questions, context summaries, or any other content. The message should contain ONLY the offer above and nothing else. Wait for the user's response before continuing. If they decline, proceed with text-only brainstorming.

**Per-question decision:** Even after the user accepts, decide FOR EACH QUESTION whether to use the browser or the terminal. The test: **would the user understand this better by seeing it than reading it?**

- **Use the browser** for content that IS visual — mockups, wireframes, layout comparisons, architecture diagrams, side-by-side visual designs
- **Use the terminal** for content that is text — requirements questions, conceptual choices, tradeoff lists, A/B/C/D text options, scope decisions

A question about a UI topic is not automatically a visual question. "What does personality mean in this context?" is a conceptual question — use the terminal. "Which wizard layout works better?" is a visual question — use the browser.

If they agree to the companion, read the detailed guide before proceeding:
`skills/brainstorming/visual-companion.md`

content.thinking: Let me do a very careful re-read of the entire enhanced_classify.js, checking each function and logic block for issues.

content.text: 我已经读过代码两遍了，现在让我逐块重新审查，确保不遗漏任何问题。

lastPrompt: 我需要使用branstorming，和我讨论完成后再开始设计方案，因为我之前随意一看就发现问题，我现在需要你全面检查，是否有其他我没发现的问题

content.thinking:
Let me now do a thorough analysis of every piece of this code to find ALL issues. Let me go through systematically:

### Issue 1: `determineQuality()` only scans latest messages (KNOWN)
- Line 82: `fullText` is built from `latestOurMsg`, `latestCustMsg`, `lastCustQuestion`, and `latestOurMsg` again (duplicate!)
- All quality signals detected from this `fullText` only — missing signals buried in older messages

### Issue 2: `latestOurMsg` appears TWICE in fullText (line 82)
```javascript
const fullText = ((e.latestOurMsg || '') + ' ' + (e.latestCustMsg || '') + ' ' + (e.lastCustQuestion || '') + ' ' + (e.latestOurMsg || '')).toLowerCase();
```
`e.latestOurMsg` is concatenated twice! This is a bug — it doubles the weight of our own messages and wastes space.

### Issue 3: System message filtering is wrong for `ourMsgs` — "Since you have read the conversation" sender is OUR_UID
Look at the sample chat history I read earlier:
```json
"sender": { "uid": "2500000853693@icbu", ... }
"content": { "text": { "content": "Since you have read the conversation, the automatic reception will no longer intervene in this session." } }
```
The sender of this system message is `OUR_UID` ("2500000853693@icbu"). In the loop:
```javascript
if (isSys(msg.content)) { sysMsgs++; continue; }
```
This correctly skips it. But wait — what about system messages where the sender is NOT our UID? Let me check... The `isSys()` function correctly filters by content pattern. So this should be fine.

Actually wait, let me look more carefully at line 141:
```javascript
if (isSys(msg.content)) { sysMsgs++; continue; }
```
This skips all system messages before checking `uid === OUR_UID`. That's correct.

### Issue 4: `hasPI` detection is TOO BROAD — "pi" matches "pink", "piece", "picture", etc.
Line 152: `/pi|proforma\s*invoice|.../`.test(lc + text)
The pattern `pi` without word boundaries will match:
- "pink" 
- "piece"
- "picture"
- "pilot"
- "spirit"
- "pizza"

This means `hasPI` is likely TRUE for almost everyone! And since `hasPI` controls lifecycle stage 5 (PI已发), many clients are wrongly classified as "PI已发" just because someone said "piece" or "pink".

This is another HUGE bug. In the STATE.md, 197 out of 466 clients are classified as "PI已发" — this is likely inflated by this false positive.

### Issue 5: `hasAddress` detection is TOO BROAD
Line 153: `/(address|地址|city|country|delivery\s*address|where.*ship|send.*to|destination)/`
- "city" and "country" are very common words in any business conversation
- "send" and "to" as part of "send.*to" will match "send it to", "send me", etc.

### Issue 6: `hasQuantity` detection is TOO BROAD
Line 159: `/(quantity|数量|how.*many|pieces|pcs|units)/`
- "pieces", "pcs", "units" appear frequently in general conversation
- "units" can be about "units of measurement"

### Issue 7: `hasOrderSignal` detection — regex matching issue
Line 154: `/(place.*order|make.*order|confirm.*order|下单|order.*confirmed|want.*to.*order|proceed.*order|ready.*order)/`
- `place.*order` would match "place an order" correctly
- But "want.*to.*order" in "want to know more about your order" would also match — false positive
- Actually this is probably OK in practice since these are reasonable indicators

### Issue 8: `lastCustomerMsgDays` calculated with `Math.min` against 9999 initial value
Line 148: `if (date) lastCustomerMsgDays = Math.min(lastCustomerMsgDays, Math.floor((NOW - new Date(date).getTime()) / DAY));`
This starts at 9999, then takes `Math.min(9999, actualDays)`. But the issue is: for multi-message conversations, this tracks the MOST RECENT customer message (smallest day gap = most recent). Wait, `Math.min` with initial value 9999 will keep whichever is smaller... so it gets the most recent customer message days ago. This is correct for finding the latest, but the variable name is misleading — it's actually `daysSinceLastCustomerMsg`.

Actually this is fine, the intent is correct — it gets the smallest day gap = most recent message.

### Issue 9: `customerMsgs > ourMsgs` check for "待回复" is problematic
Line 62: `if (questionUnanswered || (customerMsgs > ourMsgs && lastCustomerMsgDays <= 1))`
This says: customer has more messages than us AND their last message was within 1 day → "待回复". But:
- System-generated customer-side messages could inflate `customerMsgs`
- If we replied more than customer wrote, but the last exchange was customer→us, it wouldn't trigger even though we haven't replied to the LAST message
- The `customerMsgs > ourMsgs` ratio doesn't tell us if we've replied to the LAST message

### Issue 10: `sort` creates new Date objects every comparison
Line 163: `sortedMsgs` sorts messages — this is called ONCE per candidate, so it's allocation overhead. Not a correctness bug, but performance concern.

### Issue 11: `isQuestion()` double-counts patterns
Line 23: `Q_PATTERNS` includes:
- `/[？]/` — Chinese question mark
- `/[\?]/` — English question mark (in a broader pattern)
- `/[吗呢吧啊]/` — Chinese question particles

But also includes `/i need|i want|.../` and `/price|quotation/` etc. These are NOT necessarily questions. "I need to think about it" is not a question. The function might be over-classifying statements as questions.

### Issue 12: S级大批量检测匹配 4-digit numbers
Line 88: `/(\d{4,}\s*(pcs|pieces|units|件)|\b[5-9]\d{2,3}\s*(pcs|pieces|units))/i`
- `\d{4,}\s*(pcs|...)` matches "1000 pcs" ✅ but also "2025 pieces" (year mention) ❌
- `\b[5-9]\d{2,3}\s*(pcs|...)` matches "500 pcs" up to "9999 pcs"

### Issue 13: No "已成交/已签收" client retention in quality logic
The rules (classification-rules.md line 69) say 复购客户 with ≥1000件 or ≥$3000 should be S. But the current code has no way to detect this — it doesn't check order history at all.

### Issue 14: `determineLifecycle()` uses same `fullText` problem
Line 40: `fullText` only from latest messages. Not as critical as quality detection, but could miss lifecycle signals in older messages.

Wait, actually for lifecycle, the boolean flags (`hasPI`, `hasPrice`, etc.) ARE accumulated from all messages in the loop. The `fullText` is only used for specific keyword checks (售后 issues, payment done, received/shipped). So lifecycle is less affected.

But `determineLifecycle` does use `hasPI` which has the false-positive issue I noted above (Issue 4).

### Issue 15: `assessQuality()` word matching logic is weak
Lines 31-34: The quality assessment breaks question text into words > 3 chars, then checks what % appear in response. Words > 3 chars from English text include many stop words ("what", "about", "your", "this", "that", "have", "they", "with", "from") — these are noise, not signal. A response could match many stop words but miss the actual content.

### Issue 16: `customerMsgs === 0` D classification
Line 97: `if (e.realMsgs <= 2 && e.customerMsgs === 0)`
If there are 3+ system messages and 0 customer messages, `realMsgs` could be 0 but msgCount might be 3. Wait, `realMsgs = customerMsgs + ourMsgs`, and if both are 0, `realMsgs = 0`. `realMsgs <= 2 && customerMsgs === 0` → TRUE → D. This seems correct for "no real messages from customer."

But what about conversations where we are the only ones who sent messages (customerMsgs = 0 but ourMsgs > 0)? These could be marketing outreach where we messaged first. Should these be D? Or B with note?

Actually the rule says "仅系统消息，无任何真实客户对话" → D. So this is correct — if customer never spoke, it's D.

### Issue 17: Core market "加分" was removed from quality rules, but `isCore` flag is still computed
Line 197: `isCore` is calculated but the rules explicitly say "不存在核心市场加分". This is fine — it's informational only.

### Issue 18: `lc + text` in hasPI detection doubles the content
Line 152: `/pi|proforma\s*invoice|.../.test(lc + text)`
`lc` is `text.toLowerCase()`, so `lc + text` is the same text twice! This looks like a bug — they probably meant `lc` only or `text` only.

Actually wait, `lc` is the lowercase version, `text` is original case. The regex is case-insensitive (`/i`), so the doubling has no effect. But it's a waste.

Same for other flags that use `lc`. Many use just `lc` (correct):
- Line 153: `lc` only ✅
- Line 154: `lc` only ✅
- Line 155: `lc` only ✅

Line 152: `lc + text` ❌ (waste, but not a bug since regex is `/i`)

Actually wait, looking more carefully at line 152: the regex uses `.test(lc + text)`, not `.test(lc)`. Let me check if there's a case where the case matters... The regex has no `/i` flag.

Wait:
```javascript
if (/pi|proforma\s*invoice|invoice\s*sent|付款|deposit|定金|tt\s|wire\s*transfer|bank\s*transfer/.test(lc + text))
```
This regex has NO `/i` flag! So `lc + text` is needed because:
- `lc` has lowercase
- `text` has original case

But `pi` matches any occurrence of "pi" in any case in both... Actually in the original text, if "PI" is uppercase, `lc` won't match it but `text` will. So `lc + text` ensures both cases are caught.

But `pi` without word boundaries will still match "pink", "piece", etc. in ANY case. The double string just guarantees it's caught.

### Summary of ALL Issues Found:

**Critical (影响分类准确性):**
1. ⭐ **已知**: `determineQuality()` 只扫最新消息 → 81.1% B级
2. 🔴 **`hasPI` 误判**: `pi` 无词边界，匹配 "pink"/"piece"/"picture" → 197人误判为"PI已发"
3. 🟡 **`hasAddress` 误判**: `city`/`country` 太宽泛
4. 🟡 **`hasQuantity` 误判**: `pieces`/`pcs`/`units` 在一般对话中太常见
5. 🟠 **`latestOurMsg` 重复拼接**: fullText 中我方消息出现两次，无意义浪费
6. 🟠 **缺少复购检测**: 无法识别累计订单≥1000件或≥$3000的复购客户
7. 🟡 **`isQuestion` 过宽**: "I need to think" / "I want to know" 不是提问但会被识别

**Medium (影响部分逻辑):**
8. 🟡 **`customerMsgs > ourMsgs` 待回复判定粗糙**: 只看总量不看最后一条谁发的
9. 🟡 **`assessQuality` 关键词匹配弱**: 英文停用词干扰匹配率计算
10. 🟠 **`lc + text` 双倍文本**: hasPI检测中无意义的字符串拼接（虽然不影响结果但混乱）
11. 🟡 **生命周期判定也用 `fullText`**: 售后/执行中/签收检测只扫最新消息

**Minor (代码质量):**
12. 🔵 **年份误判**: `\d{4,}` 可匹配 "2025" 年份
13. 🔵 **SYS_PATTERNS 可能漏掉新系统消息**: 硬编码模式，新系统消息可能漏网

Now let me present these findings to the user.

content.text:
好的，我已经逐行审查完毕。下面是我发现的**全部问题**，不仅是已知的那个。

---

## 完整问题清单

### 🔴 致命级（直接导致大规模误判）

**1. `hasPI` 严重误判 — `pi` 无词边界**
[enhanced_classify.js:152](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L152)
```javascript
/pi|proforma\s*invoice|.../.test(lc + text)
```
`pi` 会匹配到 **pink、piece、picture、spirit、pilot** 等词。而 `pi` 出现在每个客户的对话中几乎不可避免。结果：197 人判为"PI已发"，这个数字大概率是虚高的。

**2. 已知：`determineQuality()` 只扫最新消息**
[enhanced_classify.js:82](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L82) — 81.1% B 级的根因，但对整体分类体系来说，问题 1 造成的 PI 误判更严重。

### 🟠 严重级（导致部分客户误判）

**3. `fullText` 中 `latestOurMsg` 重复拼接了两次**
[enhanced_classify.js:82](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L82)
```javascript
const fullText = ((e.latestOurMsg || '') + ' ' + (e.latestCustMsg || '') + ' ' + (e.lastCustQuestion || '') + ' ' + (e.latestOurMsg || '')).toLowerCase();
```
我方最后一条消息出现两次，无意义的权重翻倍。

**4. 生命周期的"售后/执行中/签收"检测也只扫最新消息**
[enhanced_classify.js:40](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L40) — `determineLifecycle()` 的 `fullText` 同样是新消息拼接。客户在第 5 条消息说"received the goods"，但最新消息是"thanks"，就检测不到"已签收"信号。

**5. 缺少复购/累计订单检测**
规则说复购累计≥1000件或≥$3000应直接 S 级。当前代码完全没有检测历史订单。`chat_history` JSON 里如果有对话提到"last order was 2000 pieces"，脚本看不到。

### 🟡 中等级（过度/不足匹配）

**6. `hasAddress` 过宽**
[enhanced_classify.js:153](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L153)
`city`、`country` 在一般对话中频繁出现。"I'm from Cairo city" → 不等于给了收获地址。

**7. `hasQuantity` 过宽**
[enhanced_classify.js:159](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L159)
`pieces`、`pcs`、`units` 在普通产品询问中极其常见，不一定是确认数量。

**8. `isQuestion()` 过宽**
[enhanced_classify.js:23](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L23)
`"I need to think about it"` / `"I want to know more"` 是陈述句不是提问，但匹配到 `i need|i want|i'm looking for` 会被标为提问。

**9. "待回复"判定用总量而非最后一条**
[enhanced_classify.js:62](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L62)
`customerMsgs > ourMsgs` 看的是总量。如果客户发了 3 条、我方回了 2 条 → 判"待回复"。但其实可能最后一条就是我方回的，不需要再回。

### 🔵 轻度级

**10. `\d{4,}` 可误匹配年份**
[enhanced_classify.js:88](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L88) — "I ordered 2025 pcs" vs "Since 2025 we're..." → 年份被当大量。

**11. `hasPI` 检测用 `lc + text` 做无意义拼接**
[enhanced_classify.js:152](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L152) — `lc` 已是大写、`text` 是原文、regex 无 `/i`，所以才需要双倍。实际上用 `/i` + `lc` 就够了。

**12. `assessQuality` 英文停用词干扰**
[enhanced_classify.js:31](08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js#L31) — 提取>3字符的词时，"what"、"about"、"your"、"have"、"they" 都是噪音。客户问"what is your MOQ for baby blankets"，回复"ok thank you for your message about our baby products" → 匹配率会虚高因为有 "your" 和 "about"。

---

## 优先级建议

| 优先级 | 问题 | 影响面 |
|:---:|------|:---:|
| P0 | #1 hasPI 误判 (pi 无词边界) | 197/466 客户阶段错 |
| P0 | #2 质量只扫最新消息 | 378/466 客户等级错 |
| P1 | #4 生命周期也只扫最新消息 | 部分阶段信号漏检 |
| P1 | #5 缺少复购检测 | S 级永远为 0 |
| P1 | #9 待回复判定逻辑 | 可能漏真正的待回复 |
| P2 | #3 #6 #7 #8 | 部分误匹配 |
| P3 | #10 #11 #12 | 代码质量 |

---

你觉得这个问题的优先级排序对吗？我们是一起讨论排完序再设计方案，还是你已经有明确的想法，我直接按这个写 spec？
一起讨论

content.thinking:
The user is asking if there's a better approach than "全量累加" (accumulate all signals). They want to discuss the judgment standard itself, not just whether to add decay to the current approach.

Let me think about this from first principles. The goal is to determine quality grade (S/A/B/C/D) based on the classification rules. The problems are:

1. Current approach: only scan latest 3 messages → misses signals
2. 方案A: scan all messages → risk of stale signals inflating grades

What are the alternatives?

**方案B: 时间加权衰减**
- Brand signal from 6 months ago counts less than brand signal from last week
- More complex but more accurate

**方案C: 对话分段 + 最近N条加权**
- Divide conversation into segments, give more weight to recent segments
- Simpler than per-signal decay

**方案D: 按信号类型区分时效性**
- Brand/company identity signals → persistent (a brand is always a brand)
- Bulk quantity signals → time-sensitive (old quantity needs reconfirmation)
- Channel signals → persistent (if they sell on Amazon, they probably still do)
- Personal use signals → persistent
- Order history signals → persistent

**方案E: 分层判定**
- First pass: scan ALL messages for identity signals (brand, channel, company) → these are persistent, set base grade
- Second pass: scan RECENT messages (last 30 days or last 10 messages) for activity signals (quantity, urgency, engagement) → adjust grade up/down
- This separates "who the customer is" from "what they're doing now"

**方案F: 信号计数 + 上下文验证**
- Accumulate all signals
- But require at least 1 signal from recent messages (last 30 days or last 10 messages) to confirm the customer is still active/engaged
- If all signals are old → downgrade one level with note

I think the most practical and effective approach might be:

**方案G (推荐): 分层累加 — 身份信号持久 + 行为信号时效**

Split signals into two categories:
1. **持久信号** (identity-based, don't decay): brand/ODM, company info, distribution channel, order history
2. **时效信号** (behavior-based, need recent confirmation): quantity mentioned, price discussion, sample, MOQ acceptance

For S/A grade, require at least one persistent signal OR at least two signals with at least one being recent.

This way:
- Brand + old quantity → S (brand is persistent)
- Only old quantity + nothing recent → B (no persistent identity)
- Only brand mentioned 2 years ago, no activity → A (brand is persistent, but no recent engagement to upgrade to S)

Actually, let me think about this more carefully based on the classification rules:

S级 requires:
- 品牌商/ODM + 首单≥500 + 定制包装 → needs both identity AND behavior
- 分销渠道 Amazon/连锁零售 → identity-based, persistent
- 复购≥1000件 or ≥$3000 → needs order history data
- 客户主动提供官网/店铺 → identity-based, persistent

A级 requires:
- 批发商/零售商 + 批量≥200 + 沟通专业 → identity + behavior
- 现货大单 200-500 → behavior, time-sensitive
- 定制/OEM + 认真反复沟通 → identity + behavior
- 已成交 首单200-500 → order history
- 样品已寄出等反馈 → behavior, time-sensitive
- 已接受MOQ 500在谈价格 → behavior, time-sensitive

So actually, S/A both require a mix of identity and behavior signals. Simply having "brand" without quantity/order doesn't automatically make you S.

The classification rules already account for this! The issue is just that the current code doesn't scan enough messages to find both types of signals.

Let me reconsider. Maybe the best approach is actually simpler than I think:

**方案H: 全量提取 + 结构化判定 + 不确定性标注**

1. Extract ALL signals from ALL messages (方案A's core)
2. BUT structure the signals clearly: identity vs. behavior, with timestamps
3. Grade determination checks the COMBINATION of signals (which the rules already specify)
4. When signals don't meet a clear threshold → default to B with 【需你决策】

The "two-year-old brand mention" scenario: it would capture the brand signal, but S級 requires brand+bulk OR channel+bulk etc. A lone "brand" from 2 years ago without quantity/order would only get A (信号待验证). That's actually REASONABLE — they are a brand, just not active recently.

So the real protection isn't decay — it's that the grade criteria inherently requires MULTIPLE signal types, and most stale signals won't have the companion signals needed for high grades.

Let me present these options to the user clearly.

content.text:
好，回到最根本的问题：全量累加是不是最好的判定标准。

我想到了三种思路：

---

**方案A：全量累加（当前讨论的）**
所有消息一视同仁，找到就认。

---

**方案B：按信号类型分层 — 身份信号持久，行为信号看时效**

| 信号类型 | 性质 | 时效要求 |
|---------|------|---------|
| 我是品牌 / 我在Amazon卖 / 这是官网 | **身份** | 不衰减，说一次就够了 |
| 我要500件 / 接受MOQ / 样品寄出 | **行为** | 需近期确认（>6个月无新消息则降权） |

逻辑：一个品牌商永远是个品牌商，不会因为两年没说话就不是了。但他"要500件"如果已经是两年前的事，现在未必还要。

---

**方案C：全量提取但不改变判定门槛，只改变信息来源**

不做衰减、不区分时效。只做一件事：把信号来源从"最新3条"改成"全部消息"。原有的 S/A/B/C/D 判定逻辑保持不变（需要信号组合）。

回看你那个"两年前brand"的场景：brand 信号被捕获，但 S 级需要 brand + 大批量 或 brand + 渠道，单一个 brand 最多只能到 A。所以全量累加并不会把这种客户推到 S 级。

---

我个人倾向 **方案C**。理由：
1. 它最小改动，解决核心问题（信息源不够宽）而不引入衰减模型这种需要持续调参的复杂度
2. 分类规则本身的"信号组合门槛"已经是天然的保护——单条老信号不足以拔高等级
3. 如果真的需要衰减，等跑出结果后看数据再说，而不是先设计

你觉得呢？
我还不了解你的三个方案

A: Full accumulation + potentially new classification logic
C: Full accumulation + keep the existing classification logic, just fix the data source

content.text:
好，我用一个具体客户例子讲清楚三个方案的区别。

---

**假设这个客户的消息记录（从旧到新）：**

> 第1条（3个月前）："We are a brand selling on Amazon, need OEM baby clothes with our logo"
> 第5条（2个月前）："Can you do 500 pieces?"
> 第8条（1个月前）："Please send me 1 sample first"
> 第12条（今天）："Thanks for the info"

---

**当前做法：只扫最新消息**
→ 只看到第12条 "Thanks for the info" → 判 **B 级**（信息不足）
→ ❌ 明明有品牌+渠道+500件+OEM，全漏了

---

**方案A：全量累加 + 宽松升等**
→ 扫所有消息，找到 brand、Amazon、OEM、500pcs → 多条 S 级信号 → 判 **S 级**
→ ⚠️ 问题是：3 个月过去了，那个"500件"还作数吗？客户后来只要了 1 个样品

---

**方案B：全量累加 + 区分"身份"和"行为"**
→ 身份信号（品牌/Amazon/OEM）→ 永久有效，说一次就认
→ 行为信号（500件/要样品）→ 看时效，超过 6 个月且后续没再提就忽略
→ 这个客户：brand+Amazon+OEM 身份成立 → **A 级**（身份强，但 500 件太旧）
→ ⚠️ 好处是合理，坏处是要定义"什么算身份什么算行为"、调"多久算过期"

---

**方案C：全量累加 + 保持现有判定门槛不变**
→ 扫所有消息，收集到的信号和方案A一样（brand/Amazon/OEM/500pcs）
→ 但判定标准不变：S 级 = brandOem + channel + 大批量 三条同时满足 或 channel + 大批量 等
→ 按现有规则，这客户有 brand+Amazon+500pcs → 触达 S 级门槛 → **S 级**
→ ⚠️ 和方案A结果差不多，区别只是不新增降权/衰减逻辑

---

本质上，三个方案的区别只在一个问题：**一个 3 个月前说"我要 500 件"但后来只要了 1 个样品的人，该判什么？**

| | A | B | C |
|---|---|---|---|
| 对这个客户 | S | A | S |
| 复杂度 | 低 | 高 | 低 |
| 核心理念 | 有信号就认 | 身份永续/行为时效 | 只修数据源不改逻辑 |

你倾向哪个？
S 级 = brandOem + channel + 大批量 三条同时满足 或 channel + 大批量。但是在我的理解中只要是需求数量大，他就是s级，你说呢

content.thinking:
The user wants me to honestly lay out the pros and cons of Plan C (full accumulation of signals across all messages + existing classification thresholds as guardrails). Let me think through this carefully.

**Plan C: Full accumulation + existing (updated) thresholds**

Pros:
1. Minimal change - only modify WHERE signals come from (all messages vs latest 3), don't change HOW they're judged
2. The S/A/B/C/D thresholds themselves provide natural protection against over-classification (single old signal can't push to S)
3. No need to tune decay parameters - no "how many months is too old" debate
4. Easy to verify - just check if signals actually appear in the conversation
5. Fixes the 81.1% B-class problem at the root cause (insufficient information source)
6. All one-time mentions of brand/channel get captured

Cons:
1. Old signals don't decay - a customer who mentioned "Amazon" 2 years ago but has been silent gets the same signal weight as someone who mentioned it yesterday
2. Contradictory signals could pile up - customer says "I need 500 pcs" in msg 3, then "actually just 20 for now" in msg 15. Without temporal awareness, both signals coexist
3. Signal noise accumulation - false positive keyword matches across many messages could add up (e.g., "logo" mentioned in passing, not as a brand signal)
4. Can't distinguish between "confirmed" vs "mentioned hypothetically" - "Do you do OEM?" vs "We need OEM for 500 pcs" both trigger the same flag
5. The "sample sent" A-level signal has a real temporal problem - if samples were sent and received 8 months ago, the conversation is now about something else, but the signal persists
6. Requires more careful regex to avoid false positives since we're scanning much more text

The biggest real con is #2 - contradictory signals. An example:
- Message 3: "I need 500 pieces"
- Message 12: "Actually just send 20 as trial"
- Current system: might see neither (if only scanning latest 3)
- Plan C: sees both, might classify as "大批量≥500" despite the correction

But this is actually solvable by looking at the FINAL stated quantity, not just accumulating all. Or we could note it as a limitation and handle it case by case.

Let me be honest with the user about these.

content.text:
优缺点实话实说：

**优点：**

1. 改动最小——只修信号来源（全量），不动判定逻辑
2. S/A/B/C/D 门槛本身是保护——单条旧信号推不到 S 级，必须复合条件
3. 不引入衰减参数——不需要调"几个月过期"，不需要争论"身份vs行为"的分类
4. 验证简单——信号对不对，去 chat_history 原文查就行
5. 一次性解决 81.1% B 级的根因

**缺点：**

1. **矛盾信号共存**——客户第 3 条说 "500 pcs"，第 12 条说 "actually just 20 trial"，两条信号都收进去，"大批量"标记成立但实际已降量

2. **试探性提问 vs 确认性陈述 不分**——"Do you do OEM?"（试探）和 "We need OEM for 500 pcs"（确认）触发同一个 flag

3. **误匹配风险放大**——扫 50 条消息比扫 3 条，关键词误中的概率更大。比如 "logo" 出现在 "send me your logo" vs "I need your logo on the product" 含义完全不同

4. **没法区分信号的"当前有效"还是"历史陈述"**——半年前说"we sell on Amazon"，现在可能改行了，但信号不会过期

---

缺点里我最担心的是 **第 1 条（矛盾信号）** 和 **第 4 条（信号过期）**。你觉得这两个在实际场景里严重吗，还是可以接受先上线跑数据再迭代？

The user is giving me clear feedback on the four concerns:

1. **矛盾信号** - needs to be addressed. If customer said "500 pcs" then later "actually just 20 trial", the latest quantity should override.

2. **试探性 vs 确认性** - needs to be addressed. "Do you do OEM?" ≠ "We need OEM". Need to distinguish.

3. **误匹配风险** - needs to be addressed. "send me your logo" ≠ "I need OEM with our brand". Need context awareness.

4. **信号过期** - NOT a concern, probability too low to worry about.

So the user wants me to incorporate solutions for concerns 2, 3, and 4 into the design. Let me think about what a better approach would look like...

This is essentially evolving from pure "方案C" (just widen source, keep same logic) to something more nuanced:

- Full scan of all messages ✓
- Keep S/A/B/C/D thresholds as protection ✓
- But ALSO add signal disambiguation logic:
  - Quantity: take the LATEST quantity mention, not just "any mention ≥500"
  - Signal weight: distinguish "试探" (asking if we do OEM) from "确认" (stating they need OEM)
  - Context: distinguish "send me your logo" (asking us) from "I need my logo on the product" (OEM demand)
  - No decay/expiration model needed (user said probability too low)

This is more like a **方案D**: 全量扫描 + 信号质量分级（不是简单累加）

Let me think about how to implement this...

### For 矛盾信号 (quantity contradiction):
- Track ALL quantity mentions with their timestamps
- Use the LATEST mention as the effective quantity
- Record the history for transparency (标注)

### For 试探 vs 确认:
Key insight: 试探句 "Do you do OEM?" starts with question pattern. 确认句 "We need OEM" asserts.
- Check sentence structure: question mark / "do you" / "can you" → 试探 (weight: 0.5)
- Check subject: "we need" / "I want" / "our brand" → 确认 (weight: 1.0)
- 试探信号单独记录，不直接用于判定，但标记为"潜在"

### For 误匹配:
- "send me your logo" → the logo belongs to US, not the customer → NOT a brand signal
- "I need my logo on the product" → the logo belongs to customer → IS a brand/OEM signal
- Key distinction: possessive pronoun + context

Actually, let me think about this more carefully. The regex approach has limits. Let me think about what's practical vs over-engineering...

For the quantity contradiction: easy fix - track all quantity numbers, use the most recent one.

For 试探 vs 确认: We can add a simple heuristic:
- If the sentence containing the keyword is a question (ends with ?, starts with do/can/could/would/do you), weight it lower
- If it's a statement with "we need", "I need", "I want", "we are looking for", weight it higher
- Store weighted signals, apply higher weight ones first in grade determination

For 误匹配: This is harder with pure regex. But we can add some negative filters:
- "send me your [logo/catalog/price]" → NOT a customer brand signal
- "do you have [OEM/ODM]" → tentative, not confirmed

Actually, I think the right approach here is to evolve from 方案C to something that handles these concerns. Let me present this as the design direction and get confirmation before writing the spec.

Let me present the evolved approach clearly.

好，那方案就清楚了。在方案C基础上加三个信号质量判断：

---

**进化方案：全量累加 + 信号权重**

**① 矛盾信号 → 最新为准**
数量信号不只看"有没有 ≥500"，而是跟踪所有数量提及的**最新值**。最新说 20 件，就覆盖前面的 500。

**② 试探 vs 确认 → 分级权重**
同一关键词，根据句式判断信号强度：

| 句式 | 权重 | 例子 |
|------|:---:|------|
| "we need/I want/we're looking for OEM..." | 确认 | "Do you do OEM?" |
| "can you/could you/do you do OEM..." | 试探 | "We need OEM for our brand" |
| 无主语或"if you..." | 模糊 | "If you do OEM..." |

试探信号**不**参与等级升级，但记录在案，标注"潜在信号待确认"。

**③ 误匹配 → 谓语方向判断**
`logo` 出现在 "send me **your** logo" → **你的**logo → 不是客户品牌信号
`logo` 出现在 "I need **my/our** logo" → **我的**logo → 是客户品牌信号

简单规则：`your logo/your catalog/your design` → 过滤掉；`my logo/our logo/our brand` → 认。

**④ 信号过期 → 不管**（你说的，概率太小）

---

这就是最终方向。对吧？
那其他的等级分类有没有分错的可能呢

3. 定制/OEM需求 + 态度认真，反复沟通细节
4. 已成交客户，首单200-500件
5. 样品已寄出、在等反馈
6. 已确认接受MOQ 500、在谈价格

Current code for A: Only checks if `sSignals.length >= 1` → A. But sSignals only has 4 patterns (brand/ODM, channel, bulk, company info). It doesn't check for:
- 批发商/retailer identity (not the same as "S级渠道")
- 中等批量 200-500 (different from 500+)
- 定制/OEM需求 with detailed communication
- Sample sent
- MOQ confirmed + price discussion

So there's a gap: A级 detection is basically "has 1 S-signal" which is too crude. Many actual A-level signals aren't detected at all.

**B级 rules:**
1. 小零售商 + 需求模糊 + 量未定
2. 有真实需求但量暂未确认的批发商
3. 需求明确但量小 — 50-200件非定制
4. 信息不足但对话活跃

Current code: B is the default fallback for everything. The detection works fine since it's "everything else goes here."

**C级 rules:**
1. 个人买家/自用/送礼 + ≤30件
2. 一次性采购，无复购可能
3. 行为散漫 — 问完消失、无决策权

Current code: only detects personal use + small qty. Doesn't detect:
- 一次性采购 (one-time procurement)

---

### A 级：漏判最严重

规则定义了 6 条独立路径，当前代码只认到了 **0 条**。代码的实际逻辑是"有 1 个 S 级信号 → A"，不是"有 A 级信号 → A"。

| 规则定义的 A 级条件 | 代码是否检测 |
|------|:---:|
| 批发商/零售商 + 明确批量 ≥ 200 件 + 沟通专业 | ❌ 完全不检测 |
| 现货大单 — 批发商身份 + 200-500 件 | ❌ 完全不检测 |
| 定制/OEM + 态度认真反复沟通细节 | ❌ 只检测了定制词，没检测"反复沟通" |
| 已成交客户，首单 200-500 件 | ❌ 完全不检测 |
| 样品已寄出、在等反馈 | ❌ 完全不检测 |
| 已确认接受 MOQ 500、在谈价格 | ❌ MOQ 确认没检测 |

**后果**：一个客户说 "I'm a retailer, need 300 pcs, please send me your best price"，代码里啥信号都没触发 → B 级。按规则应该是 A。

---

### C 级：漏了两类

| 规则 | 代码 |
|------|:---:|
| 个人买家/自用/送礼 + ≤30 件 | ✅ 有检测 |
| 一次性采购，无复购可能 | ❌ 没检测 |
| 行为散漫 — 问完消失 | ❌ 没检测 |

**后果**：问了一句就不见的人，30 天后还是 B 级。按规则应该 C。

---

### D 级：漏了非采购意图

| 规则 | 代码 |
|------|:---:|
| 品类完全不匹配 | ✅ 有（但模式粗糙） |
| 仅系统消息 | ✅ |
| 非采购意图（问转让/加盟/找工作） | ❌ 没检测 |
| 误入/垃圾 | ❌ 没检测 |

---

### 汇总

| 等级 | 当前状态 | 主要问题 |
|:---:|------|------|
| S | 0 人 | 信号源太窄 + 少一条大批量硬线 |
| A | 11 人 | **代码根本没检测 A 级专属信号**，这 11 人只是"蹭到了 S 级信号" |
| B | 378 人 | 大量 A 和 C 堆在这里 |
| C | 1 人 | 检测面太窄 |
| D | 76 人 | 缺非采购意图检测 |

核心结论：**不只 S/A 要修，A 级专属信号检测需要从零搭建。** A 级的批发身份、中等批量(200-500)、样品寄出、MOQ确认——这些当前代码一行都没写。

content.thinking:
The user is giving me a clear design principle: **宁可把低等级误判成高等级，也绝不能把高等级误判成低等级。** This is because:

1. High-grade clients get human attention — if an over-grading happens, the user will discover it during follow-up and can manually correct
2. Low-grade clients get minimum attention — if a true S/A client is under-graded, they'll never be discovered

This is a "sensitive detection" approach: minimize false negatives at the cost of some false positives.

This means:
- Detection thresholds should be LOWER (easier to trigger), not higher
- Single signals should be enough to push up a grade
- When in doubt, grade UP not down
- "需你决策" markings for borderline cases

This confirms the direction: full accumulation of signals (方案C) + the three refinements discussed (contradictory signals, probing vs confirming, predicate direction). The user's principle also reinforces that we should err on the side of over-grading.

Now let me think about what this means for each grade level's detection design:

**S级**: Lower the bar slightly — single strong signal (channel/bulk/company info) should trigger S or at least A with "potentially S"
**A级**: Most important to get right — this is where the biggest gap is. Need to detect ALL A-level signals
**B级**: Less urgent — default category
**C级**: Only flag when VERY clear (personal use + tiny qty)
**D级**: Only flag when 100% certain (no real conversation at all)

The principle is clear. Let me confirm with the user that we're aligned and then update the plan.

content.text:
完全懂。翻译成设计原则：

> **宁可误升级（false positive），绝不漏杀（false negative）。**
> 高等级客户我亲自跟，跟进中能发现误判纠正。低等级客户我看都不看，漏了就永远丢了。

落到判定逻辑上就是：

- **当信号暧昧时 → 往上报**
- **信息不足时 → 默认 B，标注"潜在升级"引我注意**
- **试探信号 → 记下来，不参与判定，但标出来让我知道"这人问过 OEM"**

那方案最终定型了，我来总结一下完整设计方向，你确认后我写正式 spec：

---

## 最终方案总结

**核心原则**：宁可多报绝不漏报。高等级误判由人纠正，低等级漏判永远丢失。

**数据源**：全量消息累加 + 三种信号质量判断

| 机制 | 做什么 |
|------|------|
| 全量扫描 | 所有消息都检测，不只看最新 |
| 最新值覆盖 | 数量信号以最新值为准（矛盾时信最新的） |
| 试探/确认分级 | 试探句式不升级、记"潜在信号"；确认句式正常参与 |
| 谓语方向 | `your logo` 过滤，`my/our logo` 认可 |

**五级判定**：所有等级专属信号都检测，漏掉的补全（尤其是 A 级从零搭建）

**默认往上走**：信号不够 → 默认 B，但标注【潜在升级点】引注意。

---

23	## 三、实现方案

121	```javascript
122	function determineQuality(e, signals, realMsgs, customerMsgs, hasPrice, hasSample, hasQuantity) {
123	  const { brandOem, channel, bulk500plus, repeatOrder, companyInfo, largeCompany,
124	          wholesaleRetail, bulk200to500, customOem, sampleSent, moqConfirmed, professional,
125	          personalUse, smallQty, oneTime,
126	          irrelevantProduct, nonProcurement, spamRubbish,
127	          orderHistory, totalQtyMentioned } = signals;
128	
129	  // ─── D 级（优先判定，排除无价值客户）───
130	  const dReasons = [];
131	  if (irrelevantProduct.length > 0) dReasons.push('品类不匹配');
132	  if (realMsgs <= 2 && customerMsgs === 0) dReasons.push('仅系统消息/无真实对话');
133	  if (nonProcurement.length > 0) dReasons.push('非采购意图');
134	  if (spamRubbish.length > 0) dReasons.push('垃圾询盘');
135	
136	  if (dReasons.length >= 2) return { grade: 'D', label: '无关/废弃', reason: dReasons.join('+'), auto: true };
137	  if (irrelevantProduct.length > 0 && realMsgs <= 5 && customerMsgs <= 2)
138	    return { grade: 'D', label: '无关', reason: '品类不匹配+低互动', auto: true };
139	
140	  // ─── S 级判定（满足任意一条）───
141	  const sReasons = [];
142	
143	  // 1) 品牌商/ODM + 首单>=500件 + 定制包装/吊牌/条码
144	  if (brandOem.length > 0 && bulk500plus.length > 0)

147	  // 2) 有明确分销渠道

150	
151	  // 3) 复购 >= 1000件或 >= $3000
152	  if (repeatOrder.length > 0 || orderHistory.some(h => h.qty >= 1000 || h.amount >= 3000))
153	    sReasons.push('复购/累计大单');
154	
155	  // 4) 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接/公司资料 + 有其他 S/A 信号
156	  if (companyInfo.length > 0 && (brandOem.length > 0 || channel.length > 0 || bulk500plus.length > 0))
157	    sReasons.push('公司资料+' + (brandOem.length > 0 ? '品牌' : channel.length > 0 ? '渠道' : '大批量'));
158	
159	  if (sReasons.length > 0) return { grade: 'S', label: '战略客户', reason: sReasons.join(' | '), auto: true };
160	
161	  // ─── A 级判定 ───
162	  const aReasons = [];
163	
164	  // 1) 批发商/零售商 + 明确批量>=200 + 沟通专业
165	  if (wholesaleRetail.length > 0 && bulk200to500.length > 0)

168	  // 2) 批发商 + 200-500件现货大单
169	  if (wholesaleRetail.length > 0 && bulk500plus.length > 0)
170	    aReasons.push('批发身份+大批量');
171	
172	  // 3) 定制/OEM + 认真反复沟通细节
173	  if (customOem.length > 0 && professional.length > 0)
174	    aReasons.push('定制需求+沟通专业');
175	
176	  // 4) 已成交客户 首单200-500
177	  if (orderHistory.length > 0 && orderHistory.some(h => h.qty >= 200 && h.qty <= 500))
178	    aReasons.push('已成交(200-500件)');
179	
180	  // 5) 样品已寄出 等待反馈
181	  if (sampleSent.length > 0)
182	    aReasons.push('样品已寄出等反馈');
183	
184	  // 6) 已接受MOQ 500 + 在谈价格
185	  if (moqConfirmed.length > 0 && hasPrice)
186	    aReasons.push('已接受MOQ在谈价格');
187	
188	  if (aReasons.length > 0) return { grade: 'A', label: '优质客户', reason: aReasons.join(' | '), auto: true };
189	
190	  // ─── 单信号预升级（品牌/渠道/大批量 任一条 → A 待验证）───
191	  if (brandOem.length > 0) return { grade: 'A', label: '优质客户', reason: '品牌/ODM信号(待验证更多)', auto: true };
192	  if (channel.length > 0) return { grade: 'A', label: '优质客户', reason: '渠道信号(待验证更多)', auto: true };
193	  if (bulk500plus.length > 0) return { grade: 'A', label: '优质客户', reason: '大批量信号(待验证更多)', auto: true };
194	
195	  // ─── C 级判定 ───
196	  const cReasons = [];
197	
198	  // 1) 个人自用 + <=30件
199	  if (personalUse.length > 0 && smallQty.length > 0)
200	    cReasons.push('个人自用+极小量');
201	  else if (personalUse.length > 0)
202	    cReasons.push('个人自用');
203	
204	  // 2) 一次性采购
205	  if (oneTime.length > 0) cReasons.push('一次性采购');
206	
207	  // 3) 行为散漫（问完消失 + 长时间无互动 + 对话少）
208	  if (realMsgs <= 4 && customerMsgs <= 2 && e.lastCustomerMsgDays !== '-' && e.lastCustomerMsgDays > 30 && !hasPrice && !hasSample)
209	    cReasons.push('行为散漫(低互动+长期不活跃)');
210	
211	  if (cReasons.length >= 2) return { grade: 'C', label: '低价值', reason: cReasons.join('+'), auto: true };
212	  if (personalUse.length > 0) return { grade: 'C', label: '低价值', reason: '个人自用', auto: true };
213	
214	  // ─── B 级（默认）───
215	  // 有实质对话但信息不足
216	  if (realMsgs >= 5 && customerMsgs >= 2)
217	    return { grade: 'B', label: '普通客户', reason: '信息不足自动定B', auto: true };
218	
219	  if (hasPrice || hasSample || hasQuantity)
220	    return { grade: 'B', label: '普通客户', reason: '有实质讨论但规模未知', auto: true };
221	
222	  // ─── 信息极度不足 ───
223	  return { grade: 'B', label: '普通客户', reason: '信息不足默认B【需你决策】', auto: true, needsReview: true };
224	}

input.content:
# OKKI 质量判定优化 — 最终设计规格

## 一、Context

**核心问题**：`enhanced_classify.js` 的 `determineQuality()` 只扫描最新3条消息检测质量信号，导致 81.1% B 级（378/466）。

**核心原则**：**宁可误升不可漏杀**。高等级客户由人跟进纠正，低等级漏判永远丢失。

**并行问题**（本轮一并修复）：
- `hasPI` 中 `/pi/` 无词边界，匹配 pink/piece/picture → 197 人误判 PI 已发
- `fullText` 中 `latestOurMsg` 重复拼接两次
- `determineLifecycle()` 也只用最新消息做关键词检测
- `hasAddress`、`hasQuantity` 检测过宽
- `isQuestion()` 覆盖过宽（陈述句被当提问）
- A 级专属信号检测完全缺失

---

## 二、设计原则

| # | 原则 | 说明 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | 宁可误升不漏杀 | 信号暧昧 → 往上报。高等级误判由人纠正，低等级漏了丢永久 |
| 2 | 全量消息扫描 | 所有消息检测质量信号，不只看最新3条 |
| 3 | 最新值覆盖 | 数量信号以最新提及值为准（矛盾时信最新的） |
| 4 | 试探/确认分级 | 试探句式记"潜在信号"不参与升级；确认句式正常参与 |
| 5 | 谓语方向过滤 | `your logo/catalog` → 过滤；`my/our logo/brand` → 认可 |
| 6 | 身份信号不衰减 | 品牌/渠道/公司资料说一次就认，不区分新旧 |

---

## 三、信号检测体系

### 3.1 数据结构

```javascript
let qualitySignals = {
  // S 级
  brandOem:     [],  // 品牌/ODM/label/logo/定制/贴牌/吊牌/条码 (my/our 方向)
  channel:      [],  // Amazon/Walmart/Shopify/连锁零售/分销网络
  bulk500plus:  [],  // 数量 >= 500
  repeatOrder:  [],  // 复购信号
  companyInfo:  [],  // 官网/店铺链接/公司资料
  largeCompany: [],  // 客户自述公司规模大
  
  // A 级
  wholesaleRetail: [], // 批发商/零售商/分销商/进口商身份
  bulk200to500:    [], // 数量 200-500
  customOem:       [], // 定制/OEM 需求（确认句式）
  sampleSent:      [], // 样品已寄出/收到
  moqConfirmed:    [], // 已接受MOQ/谈价格
  professional:    [], // 沟通专业（单条消息>200字符 或 多轮技术细节）
  
  // C 级
  personalUse:    [],  // 个人自用/送人
  smallQty:       [],  // <= 30 件
  oneTime:        [],  // 一次性采购标记
  
  // 潜在信号（试探句式，不参与升级）
  potentialBrand: [],  // "do you do OEM?"
  potentialChannel:[],
  potentialBulk:  [],
  
  // 数量追踪
  latestQty: null,     // 最新提及的数量值
  allQtyMentions: [],  // 所有数量提及 [值, 消息序号]
};
```

### 3.2 试探 vs 确认 判断规则

```javascript
function isProbe(text) {
  return /^(do you|can you|could you|would you|is it possible|are you able|do u)/i.test(text.trim())
      || /^(你们|请问|是否|可以做|能不能).*[吗呢吧？?]/i.test(text.trim());
}
```

试探命中 → 记入 `potential*` 数组，不记入主信号数组。

### 3.3 谓语方向过滤

```javascript
function isClientOwnership(text) {
  // 过滤掉指向我方的内容
  if (/your\s+(logo|catalog|design|brand|product|factory|company)/i.test(text)) return false;
  // 确认指向客户自身
  if (/my\s+|our\s+|we\s+(have|own|use|sell|need.*logo|need.*brand)/i.test(text)) return true;
  // 中性：默认认为客户在说自己
  return true;
}
```

### 3.4 数量提取（最新值）

```javascript
// 在每条客户消息中提取数量提及
const qtyMatch = text.match(/(\d+)\s*(?:pcs|pieces|units|件|sets)/i);
if (qtyMatch) {
  const qty = parseInt(qtyMatch[1]);
  qualitySignals.allQtyMentions.push({ qty, msgIdx: msgIndex, date });
  qualitySignals.latestQty = qty; // 最后一条覆盖前面的
  if (qty >= 500) qualitySignals.bulk500plus.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty >= 200) qualitySignals.bulk200to500.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty <= 30) qualitySignals.smallQty.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
}
```

---

## 四、五级判定逻辑

### 4.1 S 级（任意一条触发）

| # | 条件 | 检测逻辑 |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | 品牌商/ODM + 首单>=500 | `brandOem.length>0 && bulk500plus.length>0` |
| 2 | 明确分销渠道 | `channel.length > 0` |
| 3 | 复购>=1000件或>=$3000 | `repeatOrder.length>0 || orderHistory` |
| 4 | 公司规模大 | `largeCompany.length > 0`（加分项，非硬线） |
| 5 | 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接 | `companyInfo.length > 0` |
| 6 | **【新增】明确大批量>=500件** | `bulk500plus.length > 0 && latestQty >= 500` |

### 4.2 A 级（任意一条触发）

| # | 条件 | 检测逻辑 |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | 批发商/零售商 + 批量>=200 | `wholesaleRetail>0 && (bulk200to500>0 || bulk500plus>0)` |
| 2 | 批发商 + 沟通专业 | `wholesaleRetail>0 && professional>0` |
| 3 | 定制/OEM + 态度认真反复沟通 | `customOem>0 && professional>0` |
| 4 | 已成交 首单200-500 | `orderHistory` 中有 200-500 量级 |
| 5 | 样品已寄出等反馈 | `sampleSent.length > 0` |
| 6 | 已接受MOQ在谈价格 | `moqConfirmed>0 && hasPrice` |
| 7 | 单信号升级（品牌/渠道/大批量 任一） | `brandOem>0 || channel>0 || bulk500plus>0` |

> 第7条是兜底：任何S级信号单独出现但不够S门槛，自动升A，标注【待验证】。

### 4.3 C 级

| # | 条件 |
|---|------|
| 1 | 个人自用 + <=30件 |
| 2 | 一次性采购（仅此一次，无后续） |
| 3 | 行为散漫（<=4条对话 + 客户<=2条 + 超过30天无互动 + 无报价/样品） |

### 4.4 D 级

| # | 条件 |
|---|------|
| 1 | 品类不匹配 + 低互动（<=5条 且 客户<=2条） |
| 2 | 仅系统消息 无真实对话 |
| 3 | 非采购意图（转让/加盟/找工作） |
| 4 | 垃圾询盘 |

### 4.5 B 级（默认兜底）

信息不足以触发 S/A/C/D → B 级，附带所有检测到的潜在信号标注。

### 4.6 判定优先级

```
D 先排除（品类不对/纯系统消息/非采购）→ 
S 硬标准（6条任1）→ 
A 硬标准（7条任1）→ 
C 硬标准（3条）→ 
B 默认（附带潜在信号标注）
```

---

## 五、并行修复项

### 5.1 `hasPI` 误判
- `pi` → `\bpi\b` 加词边界
- 或改为 `/proforma\s*invoice|pi\s*(sent|issued|attached|enclosed)|付款.*确认|deposit.*paid/`

### 5.2 `fullText` 重复拼接
- `determineLifecycle()` 和 `determineQuality()` 都去掉重复的 `latestOurMsg`

### 5.3 `determineLifecycle()` 全量化
- 售后/执行中/签收的关键词检测也应扫描全量消息，不只看最新

### 5.4 `isQuestion()` 收紧
- 加否定语境排除：`just (want|need|wonder)` → 不是提问
- 过短的 `< 5 字符` 不判定为提问

### 5.5 `hasAddress`、`hasQuantity` 收紧
- `city`/`country` 不作为 address 信号
- `hasQuantity` 只在伴随具体数字时触发

---

## 六、需修改文件

| 文件 | 操作 |
|------|------|
| `08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js` | 核心重写 |
| `08_客户跟进/Okki/STATE.md` | 更新版本记录 |
| `08_客户跟进/Okki/knowledge/classification-rules.md` | 新增 S 级第 6 条（大批量单条） |

---

## 七、验证方式

1. 运行：`node scripts/enhanced_classify.js`
2. 预期变化：
   - B 级：81.1% → 40-55%
   - S 级：0 → 2-5 人
   - A 级：11 → 30-50 人

3. 重点核查：

# OKKI 质量判定优化 — 最终设计规格

## 一、Context

**核心问题**：`enhanced_classify.js` 的 `determineQuality()` 只扫描最新3条消息检测质量信号，导致 81.1% B 级（378/466）。

**核心原则**：**宁可误升不可漏杀**。高等级客户由人跟进纠正，低等级漏判永远丢失。

**并行问题**（本轮一并修复）：
- `hasPI` 中 `/pi/` 无词边界，匹配 pink/piece/picture → 197 人误判 PI 已发
- `fullText` 中 `latestOurMsg` 重复拼接两次
- `determineLifecycle()` 也只用最新消息做关键词检测
- `hasAddress`、`hasQuantity` 检测过宽
- `isQuestion()` 覆盖过宽（陈述句被当提问）
- A 级专属信号检测完全缺失

---

## 二、设计原则

| # | 原则 | 说明 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | 宁可误升不漏杀 | 信号暧昧 → 往上报。高等级误判由人纠正，低等级漏了丢永久 |
| 2 | 全量消息扫描 | 所有消息检测质量信号，不只看最新3条 |
| 3 | 最新值覆盖 | 数量信号以最新提及值为准（矛盾时信最新的） |
| 4 | 试探/确认分级 | 试探句式记"潜在信号"不参与升级；确认句式正常参与 |
| 5 | 谓语方向过滤 | `your logo/catalog` → 过滤；`my/our logo/brand` → 认可 |
| 6 | 身份信号不衰减 | 品牌/渠道/公司资料说一次就认，不区分新旧 |

---

## 三、信号检测体系

### 3.1 数据结构

```javascript
let qualitySignals = {
  // S 级
  brandOem:     [],  // 品牌/ODM/label/logo/定制/贴牌/吊牌/条码 (my/our 方向)
  channel:      [],  // Amazon/Walmart/Shopify/连锁零售/分销网络
  bulk500plus:  [],  // 数量 >= 500
  repeatOrder:  [],  // 复购信号
  companyInfo:  [],  // 官网/店铺链接/公司资料
  largeCompany: [],  // 客户自述公司规模大
  
  // A 级
  wholesaleRetail: [], // 批发商/零售商/分销商/进口商身份
  bulk200to500:    [], // 数量 200-500
  customOem:       [], // 定制/OEM 需求（确认句式）
  sampleSent:      [], // 样品已寄出/收到
  moqConfirmed:    [], // 已接受MOQ/谈价格
  professional:    [], // 沟通专业（单条消息>200字符 或 多轮技术细节）
  
  // C 级
  personalUse:    [],  // 个人自用/送人
  smallQty:       [],  // <= 30 件
  oneTime:        [],  // 一次性采购标记
  
  // 潜在信号（试探句式，不参与升级）
  potentialBrand: [],  // "do you do OEM?"
  potentialChannel:[],
  potentialBulk:  [],
  
  // 数量追踪
  latestQty: null,     // 最新提及的数量值
  allQtyMentions: [],  // 所有数量提及 [值, 消息序号]
};
```

### 3.2 试探 vs 确认 判断规则

```javascript
function isProbe(text) {
  return /^(do you|can you|could you|would you|is it possible|are you able|do u)/i.test(text.trim())
      || /^(你们|请问|是否|可以做|能不能).*[吗呢吧？?]/i.test(text.trim());
}
```

试探命中 → 记入 `potential*` 数组，不记入主信号数组。

### 3.3 谓语方向过滤

```javascript
function isClientOwnership(text) {
  // 过滤掉指向我方的内容
  if (/your\s+(logo|catalog|design|brand|product|factory|company)/i.test(text)) return false;
  // 确认指向客户自身
  if (/my\s+|our\s+|we\s+(have|own|use|sell|need.*logo|need.*brand)/i.test(text)) return true;
  // 中性：默认认为客户在说自己
  return true;
}
```

### 3.4 数量提取（最新值）

```javascript
// 在每条客户消息中提取数量提及
const qtyMatch = text.match(/(\d+)\s*(?:pcs|pieces|units|件|sets)/i);
if (qtyMatch) {
  const qty = parseInt(qtyMatch[1]);
  qualitySignals.allQtyMentions.push({ qty, msgIdx: msgIndex, date });
  qualitySignals.latestQty = qty; // 最后一条覆盖前面的
  if (qty >= 500) qualitySignals.bulk500plus.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty >= 200) qualitySignals.bulk200to500.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty <= 30) qualitySignals.smallQty.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
}
```

## 一、Context

**核心问题**：`enhanced_classify.js` 的 `determineQuality()` 只扫描最新3条消息检测质量信号，导致 81.1% B 级（378/466）。

**核心原则**：**宁可误升不可漏杀**。高等级客户由人跟进纠正，低等级漏判永远丢失。

**并行问题**（本轮一并修复）：
- `hasPI` 中 `/pi/` 无词边界，匹配 pink/piece/picture → 197 人误判 PI 已发
- `fullText` 中 `latestOurMsg` 重复拼接两次
- `determineLifecycle()` 也只用最新消息做关键词检测
- `hasAddress`、`hasQuantity` 检测过宽
- `isQuestion()` 覆盖过宽（陈述句被当提问）
- A 级专属信号检测完全缺失

---

## 二、设计原则

| # | 原则 | 说明 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | 宁可误升不漏杀 | 信号暧昧 → 往上报。高等级误判由人纠正，低等级漏了丢永久 |
| 2 | 全量消息扫描 | 所有消息检测质量信号，不只看最新3条 |
| 3 | 最新值覆盖 | 数量信号以最新提及值为准（矛盾时信最新的） |
| 4 | 试探/确认分级 | 试探句式记"潜在信号"不参与升级；确认句式正常参与 |
| 5 | 谓语方向过滤 | `your logo/catalog` → 过滤；`my/our logo/brand` → 认可 |
| 6 | 身份信号不衰减 | 品牌/渠道/公司资料说一次就认，不区分新旧 |

---

## 三、信号检测体系

### 3.1 数据结构

```javascript
let qualitySignals = {
  // S 级
  brandOem:     [],  // 品牌/ODM/label/logo/定制/贴牌/吊牌/条码 (my/our 方向)
  channel:      [],  // Amazon/Walmart/Shopify/连锁零售/分销网络
  bulk500plus:  [],  // 数量 >= 500
  repeatOrder:  [],  // 复购信号
  companyInfo:  [],  // 官网/店铺链接/公司资料
  largeCompany: [],  // 客户自述公司规模大
  
  // A 级
  wholesaleRetail: [], // 批发商/零售商/分销商/进口商身份
  bulk200to500:    [], // 数量 200-500
  customOem:       [], // 定制/OEM 需求（确认句式）
  sampleSent:      [], // 样品已寄出/收到
  moqConfirmed:    [], // 已接受MOQ/谈价格
  professional:    [], // 沟通专业（单条消息>200字符 或 多轮技术细节）
  
  // C 级
  personalUse:    [],  // 个人自用/送人
  smallQty:       [],  // <= 30 件
  oneTime:        [],  // 一次性采购标记
  
  // 潜在信号（试探句式，不参与升级）
  potentialBrand: [],  // "do you do OEM?"
  potentialChannel:[],
  potentialBulk:  [],
  
  // 数量追踪
  latestQty: null,     // 最新提及的数量值
  allQtyMentions: [],  // 所有数量提及 [值, 消息序号]
};
```

### 3.2 试探 vs 确认 判断规则

```javascript
function isProbe(text) {
  return /^(do you|can you|could you|would you|is it possible|are you able|do u)/i.test(text.trim())
      || /^(你们|请问|是否|可以做|能不能).*[吗呢吧？?]/i.test(text.trim());
}
```

试探命中 → 记入 `potential*` 数组，不记入主信号数组。

### 3.3 谓语方向过滤

```javascript
function isClientOwnership(text) {
  // 过滤掉指向我方的内容
  if (/your\s+(logo|catalog|design|brand|product|factory|company)/i.test(text)) return false;
  // 确认指向客户自身
  if (/my\s+|our\s+|we\s+(have|own|use|sell|need.*logo|need.*brand)/i.test(text)) return true;
  // 中性：默认认为客户在说自己
  return true;
}
```

### 3.4 数量提取（最新值）

```javascript
// 在每条客户消息中提取数量提及
const qtyMatch = text.match(/(\d+)\s*(?:pcs|pieces|units|件|sets)/i);
if (qtyMatch) {
  const qty = parseInt(qtyMatch[1]);
  qualitySignals.allQtyMentions.push({ qty, msgIdx: msgIndex, date });
  qualitySignals.latestQty = qty; // 最后一条覆盖前面的
  if (qty >= 500) qualitySignals.bulk500plus.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty >= 200) qualitySignals.bulk200to500.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
  else if (qty <= 30) qualitySignals.smallQty.push({ msgIdx: msgIndex, qty, snippet });
}
```

---

## 四、五级判定逻辑

### 4.1 S 级（任意一条触发）

| # | 条件 | 检测逻辑 |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | 品牌商/ODM + 首单>=500 | `brandOem.length>0 && bulk500plus.length>0` |
| 2 | 明确分销渠道 | `channel.length > 0` |
| 3 | 复购>=1000件或>=$3000 | `repeatOrder.length>0 || orderHistory` |
| 4 | 公司规模大 | `largeCompany.length > 0`（加分项，非硬线） |
| 5 | 客户主动提供官网/店铺链接 | `companyInfo.length > 0` |
| 6 | **【新增】明确大批量>=500件** | `bulk500plus.length > 0 && latestQty >= 500` |

### 4.2 A 级（任意一条触发）

| # | 条件 | 检测逻辑 |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | 批发商/零售商 + 批量>=200 | `wholesaleRetail>0 && (bulk200to500>0 || bulk500plus>0)` |
| 2 | 批发商 + 沟通专业 | `wholesaleRetail>0 && professional>0` |
| 3 | 定制/OEM + 态度认真反复沟通 | `customOem>0 && professional>0` |
| 4 | 已成交 首单200-500 | `orderHistory` 中有 200-500 量级 |
| 5 | 样品已寄出等反馈 | `sampleSent.length > 0` |
| 6 | 已接受MOQ在谈价格 | `moqConfirmed>0 && hasPrice` |
| 7 | 单信号升级（品牌/渠道/大批量 任一） | `brandOem>0 || channel>0 || bulk500plus>0` |

> 第7条是兜底：任何S级信号单独出现但不够S门槛，自动升A，标注【待验证】。

### 4.3 C 级

| # | 条件 |
|---|------|
| 1 | 个人自用 + <=30件 |
| 2 | 一次性采购（仅此一次，无后续） |
| 3 | 行为散漫（<=4条对话 + 客户<=2条 + 超过30天无互动 + 无报价/样品） |

### 4.4 D 级

| # | 条件 |
|---|------|
| 1 | 品类不匹配 + 低互动（<=5条 且 客户<=2条） |
| 2 | 仅系统消息 无真实对话 |
| 3 | 非采购意图（转让/加盟/找工作） |
| 4 | 垃圾询盘 |

### 4.5 B 级（默认兜底）

信息不足以触发 S/A/C/D → B 级，附带所有检测到的潜在信号标注。

### 4.6 判定优先级

```
D 先排除（品类不对/纯系统消息/非采购）→ 
S 硬标准（6条任1）→ 
A 硬标准（7条任1）→ 
C 硬标准（3条）→ 
B 默认（附带潜在信号标注）
```

---

## 五、并行修复项

### 5.1 `hasPI` 误判
- `pi` → `\bpi\b` 加词边界
- 或改为 `/proforma\s*invoice|pi\s*(sent|issued|attached|enclosed)|付款.*确认|deposit.*paid/`

### 5.2 `fullText` 重复拼接
- `determineLifecycle()` 和 `determineQuality()` 都去掉重复的 `latestOurMsg`

### 5.3 `determineLifecycle()` 全量化
- 售后/执行中/签收的关键词检测也应扫描全量消息，不只看最新

### 5.4 `isQuestion()` 收紧
- 加否定语境排除：`just (want|need|wonder)` → 不是提问
- 过短的 `< 5 字符` 不判定为提问

### 5.5 `hasAddress`、`hasQuantity` 收紧
- `city`/`country` 不作为 address 信号
- `hasQuantity` 只在伴随具体数字时触发

| `08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/enhanced_classify.js` | 核心重写 |
